examples.title: Add ActualText to Images in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign ActualText (and AlternativeText) to image elements in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API, creating FigureElements and binding them to XImage resources.

examples.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a Figure element, attach a Note element as its caption, and save the document as a tagged PDF to improve accessibility.

examples.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a tagged PDF, adding a paragraph element, assigning a custom tag name, and saving the document.

examples.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, accesses its tagged content, creates a link element that points to an external URL, sets a title attribute for accessibility, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Add a Note (Footnote) to a Paragraph in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a paragraph, attach a supplemental note as a footnote to that paragraph, and save the document.

examples.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break DIV element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI Element
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TOCI element in a tagged PDF, appending a paragraph beneath it, setting the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Batch Auto‑Tag PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging for each document, and save the tagged PDFs with a custom suffix.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of untagged PDF files, enable global auto‑tagging, convert each to a PDF/UA‑compliant tagged PDF, and save the results to a separate folder.

examples.title: Batch PDF/A-1b Validation with XML Logs and Dashboard
examples.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, validates each against the PDF/A‑1b standard using Aspose.Pdf, writes an XML validation log per file, and creates a summary dashboard showing compliance percentages in both console output and an XML file.

examples.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate Summary CSV
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files for PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, write XML validation logs, and create a summary CSV of the results.

examples.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, evaluate its PDF/UA accessibility compliance, and record the boolean outcome to the console and a log file.

examples.title: Create Form Field and Associate with /Form Structure Element
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBox field to a PDF's AcroForm, create a corresponding /Form structure element for tagged PDF accessibility, and link the two before saving the document.

examples.title: Create Internal Page Link with /Link Role in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical /Link element that points to an internal page number in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Nested Bullet and Numbered List in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a hierarchical bullet and numbered list in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API and validates the document for PDF/UA compliance.

examples.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph and Validate Tagging Hierarchy
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a paragraph that contains a nested table to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API and recursively validates the logical structure hierarchy.

examples.title: Create PDF with Heading and Language Attribute
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading as a tagged structure element, and assign a language attribute to both the document and the heading.

examples.title: Create Table Header with Merged Cells and ActualText
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a tagged table header to a PDF, merge header cells across columns, assign the TH role, and set the /ActualText attribute for accessibility.

examples.title: Create a Tagged 3x4 Table in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to build a 3‑row by 4‑column accessible table and add it to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF Table with Custom Data Type Tags and Validate PDF/A
examples.description: The example builds a PDF containing a visual table and a corresponding logical structure (tagged PDF) where each cell receives a custom tag that describes its data type, then saves the file and validates it against PDF/A‑1B.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Logical Table of Contents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to build a logical structure tree, add a TOC element with entries, configure a page to render the TOC, and save the PDF as an accessible, tagged document.

examples.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to set alternating background colors and custom border styles for each row of a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Enable Automatic Tagging for PDF/UA Conversion
examples.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf to automatically tag a PDF for PDF/UA compliance and save the resulting tagged document.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting a PDF's logical structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then applying an XSLT stylesheet to create a human‑readable HTML report.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, traverse its logical structure tree, and serialize the hierarchy (type, alternative text, actual text, language) into a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

examples.title: Export Tagged PDF Content to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, reads its tagged logical structure, builds a hierarchical model of StructureElements, and writes the hierarchy to a JSON file preserving the tag hierarchy.

examples.title: Extract URLs from PDF Link Annotations to CSV
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and link annotations, collects each link's URL, and writes the list to a CSV file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Note Elements and Save to Text File
examples.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, find all NoteElement objects, concatenate their ActualText values, and write the combined text to a plain .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree Traversal
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its tagged content, recursively walking the logical structure tree, and collecting the actual text of each structure element.

examples.title: Find Images Missing Alt Text in PDF
examples.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's images, checks for alternative text, and writes the identifiers of images lacking Alt text to a text file.

examples.title: Insert Form Field with Placeholder and Tag as Form Element
examples.description: Shows how to add a TextBox form field with placeholder text to an existing PDF and associate it with a tagged Form element for accessibility.

examples.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Details
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, verifies it contains tagged content, then recursively walks the logical structure tree, outputting each element's title, language, and custom tag.

examples.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize PDF Errors
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract error codes and messages, and generate a summary of error occurrences and common violation messages.

examples.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
examples.description: Shows how to set a language code on the root structure element of a tagged PDF and recursively apply it to every descendant element using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update Note Element in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, removes the first existing Note element from its tagged structure, creates a new Note element with updated text, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set Hidden Pronunciation Text Using ActualText on a Span
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a tagged PDF span element, assigning visible text and hidden pronunciation via the ActualText property, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Set Default Language for All Tagged PDF Structure Elements
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a language attribute to the document and to every structure element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically assign a concise Title to a Figure element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including setting document language and saving the result.

examples.title: Set Language of a Tagged PDF Structure Element to French
examples.description: Shows how to locate a specific tagged structure element in a PDF, change its language attribute to French, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
examples.description: Shows how to create a paragraph element in a tagged PDF, assign a concise title for accessibility, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Primary Language for Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

examples.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF and optionally update the document's metadata title using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Styled Table with Background, Borders, and Padding
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF table with per‑cell background color, custom borders, and padding using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds a paragraph by its displayed title, and modifies its ActualText attribute to improve accessibility.

examples.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
examples.description: Shows how to load a tagged PDF, check its PDF/UA compliance, run Aspose.Pdf validation, and retrieve the detailed XML compliance report.

examples.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a new blank page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, injects a custom XMP metadata block, and saves the document while preserving the new metadata.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b with Compression and Reporting
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format with high compression using Aspose.Pdf and generate a CSV‑style summary report.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process all PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, and save the converted files to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Report
examples.description: Shows how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A-1b using Aspose.Pdf, save the converted files, and record each conversion's success in a CSV report.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, decrypt each document, and save unprotected copies.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generating a deterministic password from each file name and logging the file‑name to password mappings.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using Aspose.Pdf, applying the same user password and saving the encrypted files to a separate folder.

examples.title: Batch PDF Encryption from JSON Config
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration of encryption tasks, loading each PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and saving the encrypted files while logging the results.

examples.title: Batch Split PDF into Sections by Page Ranges
examples.description: Shows how to read page range definitions from a configuration file and split a PDF into separate documents using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Change PDF Passwords Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF with the owner password, change both the user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

examples.title: Compress PDF with Default Optimization
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply Aspose.Pdf's default resource optimization, save the compressed file, and compare the original and compressed sizes.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Compression Level
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply high‑level compression using Aspose.Pdf optimization options, and save the result while reporting the size reduction.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Embedded Fonts Preservation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/A-1b while preserving the original document structure and embedded fonts, and saving the result.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (embedding missing fonts) using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1B Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the resulting document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b while Preserving Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and saving the result while automatically preserving the document's metadata.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and saving the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 while Preserving ICC Profile
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert a regular PDF to PDF/X‑3 using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the original ICC color profile and logging conversion details.

examples.title: Create PDF/A‑1b Document with Text Paragraph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a wrapped text paragraph to a page, converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saving the result.

examples.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a new PDF, adding three blank pages, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and saving the result.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, decrypt it, and save an unprotected version.

examples.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally
examples.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it to a local file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Verify Print Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using AES‑128, allowing high‑quality printing, and verifying the encryption by reopening the file with the user password.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates applying AES‑256 encryption to a PDF, restricting printing permissions, and verifying the security settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Fill Permission Only
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing only form filling while disabling content extraction.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form‑Fill Only Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption that restricts permissions to only form filling, and saving the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Output Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a network stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions, and saving the secured PDF back to an output stream.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by providing only an owner password, leaving the user password empty and removing all user permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying 128‑bit RC4 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, saving the encrypted file, and confirming that the file size grows slightly after encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128, disable copy permission, and programmatically verify the security settings by opening with the owner password and decrypting the document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Form-Fill Only Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a user and owner password, allowing only form filling while disabling printing and other actions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Restricted Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with a user password, set an owner password, and limit actions to printing only, preventing editing and copying.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only content extraction (disabling printing), and save the encrypted file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF as PDF/X-3 with Color Profiles
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X-3 compliance while preserving embedded color profiles, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by iterating over the source document's pages and saving each page as its own PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Incrementally Update PDF by Adding a Blank Page
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with read/write access and saving it in incremental update mode after appending a new blank page, preserving existing content.

examples.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF at a Specific Position
examples.description: Demonstrates loading two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, extracting a page from the source document, inserting it into the target document at a given 1‑based position, and saving the result.

examples.title: Load PDF with Disabled Font Embedding and Save
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using HtmlLoadOptions to disable font embedding and then saving the document with PdfSaveOptions.

examples.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk with Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

examples.title: Open PDF Without Password and Handle InvalidPasswordException
examples.description: Demonstrates attempting to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf without supplying a password, catching InvalidPasswordException, and handling other errors.

examples.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate every page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Fifth Page of PDF by 180 Degrees
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, rotates page 5 by 180 degrees, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90 degrees clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a physical file.

examples.title: Set and Verify PDF Document Title
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting its document title, saving the file, and then re‑opening it to verify the title.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
examples.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets the Author, Title, and Subject properties using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.

examples.description: Loads a PDF into a MemoryStream, changes its version to 1.4 using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and saves the result to the file system.

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each page into its own Document, and save each page as a separate PDF inside a dedicated folder.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF document.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF file, modifying its Author metadata, and saving the changes back to the original location using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Current User
examples.description: Loads a PDF, replaces its Author metadata with the current OS user name, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, modifying its title metadata, and saving the updated document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to version 1.5, and saving it using an incremental update to preserve the original file structure.

examples.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Passwords

examples.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values

examples.title: Compare PDF Text with Different Compression Settings
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs that have identical logical content but different compression, using Aspose.Pdf's text comparison to ignore compression differences.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Case‑Insensitive Text Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf while attempting to ignore case differences by setting the ComparisonOptions.IgnoreCase property via reflection.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, generate a visual diff PDF, and count font‑related diff operations reported as separate DiffOperation items.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes Side‑by‑Side
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that have different page dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison, producing a result PDF that aligns the content automatically.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Regions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to perform a side‑by‑side PDF comparison with Aspose.Pdf while excluding footers by defining rectangular exclude areas for each document.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading two PDF files from in‑memory streams, comparing them page‑by‑page with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.GraphicalPdfComparer, and saving the visual diff PDF to another memory stream without using temporary files.

examples.title: Flat PDF Comparison with Difference Report
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, detect changes, and save a PDF that highlights the differences.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and exclude the rectangular areas of digital signature fields so that signature regions are treated as unchanged.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Log Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf and write each diff operation type with its page number to an audit log file.

examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting diff PDF.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare specific pages of two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf by extracting the desired pages and performing a side‑by‑side comparison.

examples.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs

examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and then copy all predefined and custom metadata from the source PDF to the diff PDF.

examples.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison

examples.description: Shows how to define rectangular regions to exclude from each PDF and perform a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Image Differences Between Two PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare pages of two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's graphical comparer and save visual difference images for each page.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two Documents

examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents visually and produce a diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Limited Concurrency

examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf, export the visual differences as PNG images, and package the images into a ZIP file for easy distribution.

examples.title: Set Custom Tolerance for PDF Image Comparison

examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF, then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf and save the result.

examples.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, stamping a logo image onto each page, and then saving the document as a PPTX file.

examples.title: Add External XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A-1b and embedding an external XML file as a file‑attachment annotation.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF Archives
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and convert each one into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default compression.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files in a folder to PPTX presentations using Aspose.Pdf, enabling the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of multiple PDF files in a folder to separate JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf with a custom file‑naming pattern.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while preserving the original directory hierarchy.

examples.description: Shows how to load an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading an OFD document with OfdLoadOptions and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's default settings.

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page to a BMP image using BmpDevice with default settings.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and save it as a DOC document using the default text extraction options.

examples.title: Create PDF with Level 1 Heading

examples.title: Create and Sanitize PDF with Headings
examples.description: The code creates a PDF containing hierarchical headings with automatic numbering using Aspose.Pdf's auto‑tagging, then loads the file and sanitizes it by removing annotations while preserving the tagged heading structure.

examples.title: Create Searchable PDF from Scanned Images using OCR Overlay
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to overlay invisible OCR text on scanned PDF pages, producing a searchable PDF without altering the original images.

examples.title: Create Watermark Layer and Merge PDF Layers
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image watermark as a PDF layer using Aspose.Pdf, then merging all layers into a single layer before saving the document.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report to Custom Directory
examples.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf to save a crash report in a specified folder with a custom file name and verify that the report was created.

examples.title: Customize Crash Report File Name with CrashReportOptions
examples.description: Shows how to set a custom message and specify the HTML crash report file name using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions and GenerateCrashReport.

examples.title: Customize TOC Entry Formatting with Tab Leaders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a Table of Contents page, set different TabLeaderType values for TOC levels, and hide page numbers for specific levels using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decimal Numbering for PDF Headings
examples.description: Creates a PDF document with hierarchical headings and applies automatic decimal (Arabic) numbering using Aspose.Pdf's NumberingStyle. Demonstrates continuation of numbering across top‑level chapters and saves the file.

examples.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Embedding
examples.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file into an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then confirm the embedded file is present before saving the result.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption with no permissions (disabling printing and copying), and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its embedded files, and save each file to a specified directory.

examples.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through its pages and annotations to find link annotations, extracts the target URLs, and writes them to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each image as a PNG file while preserving its original resolution.

examples.title: Extract PDF Outline Hierarchy and Print as Tree
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, retrieves its outline (bookmarks) using Aspose.Pdf, and recursively prints the hierarchy as an indented tree structure.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Page Range
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a specified range of pages using TextAbsorber, and save the result to a plain text file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all textual content using a TextAbsorber, and write the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, retrieve its embedded XMP metadata, and save it as an XML file.

examples.title: Flatten Interactive PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all interactive form fields into static content, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Exception
examples.description: Shows how to catch an Aspose.Pdf PdfException, configure CrashReportOptions, and generate an HTML crash report file.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
examples.description: Shows how to create an HTML crash report from a caught exception using CrashReportOptions and then convert that report to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF Crash Report to Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf crash‑report options to write an HTML crash report to a network share after catching an exception.

examples.title: Generate PDF Crash Report with Custom Message
examples.description: Shows how to catch a PDF processing exception, configure a custom crash report with a diagnostic message, and generate an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF invoice, embedding ZUGFeRD XML data, converting the document to ZUGFeRD format, and saving the resulting PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a blank page at the beginning of an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert High-Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, place a high‑resolution image at specific coordinates using a rectangle, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Insert a Page from One PDF into Another
examples.description: Shows how to load two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, extract a page from the source document, insert it into a target document at a given position, and save the merged result.

examples.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save
examples.description: Shows how to cancel an ongoing asynchronous PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's InterruptMonitor and then resume the save operation on the same document and stream.

examples.title: Load PDF into Document Object
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document using the constructor and retrieving the page count.

examples.title: Create Magazine‑Style PDF with Multi‑Column Layout and Advertisement
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a two‑column magazine layout using a FloatingBox, including a headline, HTML‑formatted article, separator line, and an advertisement image.

examples.title: Merge Two PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
examples.description: Shows how to combine two PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the bookmarks from both source documents.

examples.title: Create PDF with Merged Header Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a header table that visually spans all columns of a data table using Aspose.Pdf, followed by a regular three‑column data table.

examples.title: Monitor PDF Conversion Progress with Custom Progress Handler
examples.description: Demonstrates attaching a custom progress handler to a PDF-to-HTML conversion using Aspose.Pdf and reporting conversion stages via console output.

examples.title: Print PDF Document Using Aspose.Pdf Viewer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to send a PDF file to the default printer directly from a .NET application using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer class.

examples.title: Process PDF and Generate Detailed Crash Report
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a blank page, saving it, and using Aspose.Pdf's crash‑report feature to create detailed reports for both Aspose‑specific and unexpected errors.

examples.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Lossless Compression
examples.description: Loads a PDF, configures ImageCompressionOptions for lossless PNG (quality 100), optimizes the document, and rasterizes each page to PNG files using PngDevice.

examples.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, displays its current Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, delete every annotation on each page, and save a clean version of the document.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, clear every annotation on each page, and save the sanitized document.

examples.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to strip all comments/annotations and embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with optional resource optimization.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to strip all JavaScript actions from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfJavaScriptStripper and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove Metadata and Embedded Files from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clear hidden metadata, delete embedded files, and optimize resources in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to reduce file size.

examples.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific page, and save the document, with the remaining pages automatically renumbered.

examples.title: Replace Image in PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a new image while keeping the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-generated Page
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, converts an HTML file to a PDF page, replaces a specified page in the original PDF with the new page, and saves the result.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
examples.description: Shows how to locate a specific word in a PDF and replace it with another word using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the original text formatting intact.

examples.title: Create PDF with Roman Numeral Headings and Validate Sequence
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where headings are automatically numbered with uppercase Roman numerals using Aspose.Pdf, then reloads the document to verify the numbering order.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF and Add Heading for Navigation
examples.description: Demonstrates enabling Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to sanitize a PDF and then creating a top‑level heading and paragraph via the tagged‑content API, resulting in a clean, navigable document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF Hidden Data While Preserving Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove hidden content such as JavaScript, annotations, and private info from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the document's metadata intact.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden‑data sanitizer to delete JavaScript actions and embedded files before saving a cleaned PDF document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Metadata and Compliance Markers
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, removing metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance information, optimizing resources, and saving the sanitized document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Information
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clear PDF metadata and private information such as search indexes using Aspose.Pdf's RemoveMetadata and optimization options, then saves the sanitized document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF with Hidden Data and Selective Page Rasterization
examples.description: Demonstrates configuring HiddenDataSanitizationOptions to enable all sanitization features, selectively rasterizing specific pages to images, and applying full sanitization to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sanitize PDFs by Removing Metadata and Flattening Content
examples.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, removes metadata, flattens forms and annotations, strips PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, optimizes resources, and saves the cleaned PDFs to an output folder.

examples.title: Set PDF Creation/Modification Dates and Keywords
examples.description: This example demonstrates how to assign creation date, modification date, and custom keyword metadata to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf that automatically closes the document when the current date exceeds a specified expiration date.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Rotation to 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to rotate every page of a PDF by 90° using Aspose.Pdf so the document appears in portrait orientation on landscape devices.

examples.title: Create Structured Headings with Auto and Manual Numbering in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add multiple Heading objects with different numbering styles, using auto‑sequencing and manual prefixes, to build a hierarchical table of contents in a PDF document.

examples.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1B standard, and write a validation log. The example also shows how to read the compliance flag and validation result.

examples.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A‑1A Compliance and Generate Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate a PDF file against the PDF/A‑1A standard using Aspose.Pdf and save a detailed validation report.

examples.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button group with three options, arrange them, and set a default selected option programmatically using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

examples.title: Add Text Field to PDF Using FormEditor
examples.description: Shows how to insert a new text field at given coordinates on a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

examples.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF document to an XML file using async/await, preventing UI thread blocking.

examples.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over several PDF files, load each with FormEditor, and export the AcroForm fields to individual XML files.

examples.title: Batch Import JSON Data into PDFs in Parallel
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import form data from matching JSON files into PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and process multiple files concurrently with Parallel.ForEach.

examples.title: Combine AcroForm JSON Exports from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form data from several PDF files to JSON, merge the fragments into a single JSON array, and save it to a file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form field values from a PDF document to an FDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Deserialize with Json.NET
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then deserialize the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# object with Json.NET.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Shows how to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF document to an XML file using the Form facade's ExportXml method.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF directly to an XML stream with Aspose.Pdf, avoiding any intermediate files on disk.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, enumerates all AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, and writes each field's name and .NET type to a CSV report.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON and Verify Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm field values from a PDF to a JSON file using Form.ExportJson and validates the resulting JSON structure.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON with File Splitting
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting AcroForm field names and values, serializing them to JSON, and writing the output into multiple files each limited to a maximum number of fields.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF to an XFDF file using the Form facade.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Convert to HTML via XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then transform the XML into an HTML view with XSLT.

examples.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export only specific AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON file by using WidgetAnnotation.ExportToJson and aggregating the results.

examples.title: Export Text Field Names from PDF AcroForm to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over AcroForm fields, filter for text fields, and write the field names to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields and Save
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF containing AcroForm fields, populate them from a dictionary of values using the appropriate FillField overloads, and save the modified document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array using a MemoryStream, fills the specified AcroForm fields, and returns the modified PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form, import field values from a JSON file, and save the populated document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill an existing AcroForm text box field with a string value using the Form facade and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Filter Exported AcroForm Fields Starting with "Customer"
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to XFDF, keep only fields whose names begin with "Customer", and write the filtered XML to a file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Form Fields Report
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, creates a new PDF containing a table with each field's name, type, and value, and saves the report.

examples.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a radio button group, and read the currently selected option using the Value property of RadioButtonOptionField.

examples.title: Import FDF Data into PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load an FDF file, import its field values into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a JSON file containing form field values and import them into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with the Form facade, import AcroForm field values from an XML stream using ImportXml, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form (Ignore Missing Fields)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file, and save the updated document while automatically ignoring any JSON fields that are not present in the PDF.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to serialize a C# object to JSON, load it into a MemoryStream, and import the values into an AcroForm PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form and Handle Missing Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form, importing field values from a JSON file, catching missing form fields via FormException, and saving the updated PDF.

examples.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file and import its form field values into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Import XML Data into AcroForm and Validate Required Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file, check required fields for empty or missing values, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Justify Text in a Filled PDF Textbox
examples.description: Shows how to apply justified alignment to a filled textbox field in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

examples.title: List PDF Form Field Names as JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, extracting all AcroForm field names, and printing them as an indented JSON array.

examples.title: List PDF Form Field Names Using FormEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with FormEditor, retrieving all AcroForm field names via the Form facade, and printing them to the console.

examples.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into a Single JSON
examples.description: Shows how to bind each PDF to the Form facade, export its form fields as JSON, and combine the results into one JSON array.

examples.title: Retrieve Radio Button Option Values into Hashtable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read all option values of a radio button group from a PDF using Form.GetButtonOptionValues and store them in a non‑generic Hashtable.

examples.title: Handle Unicode Form Fields with UTF‑8 XFDF Export/Import
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm fields to an XFDF file using UTF‑8 encoding, then importing the XFDF back into the PDF so that Unicode characters are preserved in form field values.

examples.title: Validate Radio Button Options in an AcroForm
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an AcroForm, retrieve the option values of a radio button group, and compare them against an expected set to verify form integrity.

examples.title: Validate XML and Import Data into PDF Form
examples.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates XML schema validation and form data import.

examples.title: Round‑Trip XFDF Export and Import for AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting filled AcroForm fields to XFDF in memory, importing them back into a fresh PDF, and verifying that the field values are preserved.

examples.title: Add Custom Annotation Flags to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TextAnnotation, setting custom annotation flags (Print and Locked), and applying it to a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

examples.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation via Facades
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed custom key/value pairs into a PDF annotation by modifying its dictionary using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and optionally adds a document‑level custom property.

examples.title: Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a text annotation, exporting and importing annotations via XFDF, flattening them, and saving the result while logging each step to a detailed log file.

examples.title: Apply Read‑Only Flag to a PDF Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the ReadOnly flag on a PDF annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API and save the updated document.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to flatten, delete, import, and export PDF annotations asynchronously by wrapping Aspose.Pdf PdfAnnotationEditor calls in Task.Run.

examples.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to create a backup copy of a PDF file and then remove all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to create a backup of a PDF file before flattening all form fields using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration that lists annotation types to keep, then removes all other annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Batch Export, Delete, and Archive PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, export all annotations to XFDF, delete the annotations, save the cleaned PDFs, and archive the XFDF files.

examples.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Read‑Only Skip
examples.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files to flatten their annotations using Aspose.Pdf, with a command‑line option to skip read‑only annotations.

examples.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, saving the results with a "_flattened" suffix.

examples.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor while supporting cancellation via a CancellationToken.

examples.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import annotation data from matching XFDF files into multiple PDF documents in a folder, saving the annotated PDFs to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Process PDFs from Azure Blob Storage with PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to stream PDF files from an Azure Blob container, flatten all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and upload the processed PDFs to another container.

examples.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs with Progress Indicator
examples.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files, clear all annotations from each page using Aspose.Pdf, save the cleaned PDFs, and display a console progress bar indicating the percentage completed.

examples.title: Batch Remove Old Annotations from PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder and delete annotations whose modification date is older than a given number of days, saving the cleaned PDFs to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Remove PDF Annotations and Generate Report
examples.description: Loads each PDF in a folder, counts existing annotations, deletes all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned files, and prints a summary of how many annotations were removed per document.

examples.title: Batch Update Annotation Author Across PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, bind each to PdfAnnotationEditor, and replace the author of all annotations with a new value, saving the results to a separate folder.

examples.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to measure the performance of removing all annotations with DeleteAnnotations versus removing a single annotation with DeleteAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Check Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to scan a PDF for annotations that share the same Name and log any duplicate occurrences across pages.

examples.title: Clone PDF Annotation, Change Color, and Move to Another Page
examples.description: Shows how to clone a text annotation from one page, change its color, and add the cloned annotation to a different page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Clone and Modify PDF Annotation
examples.description: Shows how to clone the first annotation on a PDF page, change its properties (color, contents, etc.), and add the modified copy back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Concurrent PDF Delete and Insert Test
examples.description: Demonstrates running delete and page‑import operations on the same PDF concurrently using separate PdfFileEditor instances to verify thread safety.

examples.title: Copy Annotations from a Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a template PDF and import them into several target PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete All Annotations from a PDF and Verify Count
examples.description: Shows how to count annotations on each page, remove all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and confirm the deletion by recounting.

examples.title: Delete All Annotations from PDF Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with text annotations, then using PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to remove them and verifying the removal with a unit test.

examples.title: Delete Annotation with Error Handling
examples.description: Shows how to delete a PDF annotation using PdfAnnotationEditor and catch exceptions when the specified annotation does not exist.

examples.title: Delete Annotations by Author Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, finds markup annotations whose author (Title) matches a specified name, and removes those annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

examples.title: Delete a Named Annotation from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation identified by its name from a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation from a PDF by passing its name or ID to the DeleteAnnotation method of the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Name (Literal and Variable)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove a named annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with examples that delete the annotation via a string literal and via a variable holding the name.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Specific RGB Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove annotations from a PDF only when their color matches a given RGB value using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using Configurable Types
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration file that lists annotation types and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete those annotations (or all) from a PDF.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to remove all annotations from PDF files in a specified folder by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove only text (sticky note) annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Delete Text Annotations with Exponential Backoff Retry
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding a PdfAnnotationEditor, deleting all text annotations using a retry policy with exponential backoff to handle transient file access errors, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Export Annotations to XFDF When PDF Has No Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a PDF to XFDF and verifies that an empty PDF produces a valid XFDF without any <annot> elements.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf, then compress the XFDF data with GZip for efficient storage.

examples.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to filter Highlight annotations in a PDF and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor ExportAnnotationsXfdf overload.

examples.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file with PdfAnnotationEditor and then import that XFDF into another PDF to duplicate the annotation layout.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, export them to XFDF, and save the XFDF with formatted (indented) XML for easier manual editing.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replace the default XFDF namespace with a custom one required by enterprise XML standards.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and simultaneously log the full XFDF content to a separate log file for diagnostic purposes.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
examples.description: Shows how to export annotations from pages 1‑2 of a PDF to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and a memory stream for further processing.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, export all its annotations to XFDF, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

examples.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles to Visual PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read all annotations in a PDF, extract their rectangle bounds, and create a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation rectangle with a red outline.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details into Custom Objects
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, extracting all annotations across pages, and mapping each annotation's name, type, and rectangle into a custom C# class.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Generate Summary Document
examples.description: The example extracts annotations from a PDF using the Facades API, converts them to XFDF, builds a textual summary, and writes the summary into a new PDF document.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Log to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, gather key properties, serialize them to indented JSON, and write an audit log file.

examples.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations on the first five pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from Stream
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF supplied as a stream and return the modified PDF as a MemoryStream, avoiding any file system access.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations on a Network Share
examples.description: Shows how to scan a network folder for PDF files and flatten all annotations in each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Validate Removal
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then verify that no annotation objects remain by scanning each page's annotation collection.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, flatten all annotations, and save the result, with a '--verbose' command‑line flag for detailed operation logging.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API and then validate that no annotation objects remain in the document.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Content
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in a PDF, turning them into static page graphics, and then save the result.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations While Preserving Appearance
examples.description: Shows how to convert interactive annotations into static graphics, keeping their visual look, by using PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten annotations in a PDF document.

examples.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flatten Date Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to flatten a PDF, add a custom metadata entry containing the flattening date, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Flatten PDF and Save to Custom Output Directory
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, flattening its form fields, and saving the flattened file to a user‑specified output folder.

examples.title: Fluent Deletion and Flattening of PDF Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to delete all annotations, flatten any remaining ones, and save the PDF using a fluent wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations from PDF files and create a CSV report that lists each annotation type and its count per document.

examples.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades to count the number of annotations on each page of a PDF and return the results as a dictionary.

examples.title: Get Annotation Names by Author
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and return the names of markup annotations whose author (Title) matches a specified string.

examples.title: Get Annotation Counts from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations from a PDF and count the occurrences of each annotation type.

examples.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
examples.description: Shows how to import selected annotations from multiple source PDFs into a target PDF while preserving any annotations already present by disabling the overwrite option.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments into several PDF documents using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
examples.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF stream into a PDF opened from a FileStream using Aspose.Pdf, avoiding temporary files.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file onto a selected page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

examples.title: Import XFDF into PDF and Delete Temporary File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import field data from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, save the updated PDF, and then delete the temporary XFDF file.

examples.title: List Annotation Names in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations using Aspose.Pdf, and print each annotation's Name to the console for debugging.

examples.title: List PDF Annotation Names and Page Numbers to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate annotations in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve each annotation's name and its page number, and export the list to a CSV file.

examples.title: Log and Delete PDF Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, log each annotation's name, type, and page number to a CSV file, and delete the annotations using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

examples.title: Log Original and Flattened PDF File Sizes After Annotation Flattening
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the file size before and after the operation for audit purposes.

examples.title: Log and Update Annotation Modification Timestamps
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read existing annotation Modified timestamps, log them, and update all annotations with a new timestamp using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Measure Annotation Flattening Performance on Large PDF
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a 500‑page PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and measure the time taken.

examples.title: Measure Annotation Operation Performance with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add, modify, delete PDF annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor while logging the execution time of each operation for performance monitoring.

examples.title: Merge Annotations from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to import annotation layers from several source PDFs into a target PDF and save the combined result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files into a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to import and merge several XFDF files containing form data and annotations into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace the author of annotations on a given page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Update Annotation Subject and Color in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to change the subject and color of a text annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Deletion Tool with Preview
examples.description: Shows how to let a user choose annotation types, delete those annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and open a preview of the modified document.

examples.title: Background Service to Flatten PDF Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to monitor a folder for new PDF files and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in each document.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Managing Annotations
examples.description: Shows a reusable helper class that binds to a PDF, deletes all or specific annotations, flattens them, and saves the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: PDF Utility for Deleting Pages, Flattening and Exporting Annotations
examples.description: A command‑line tool that shows how to delete specific pages, flatten all annotations, and export annotations to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: PdfAnnotationEditor Health Check Binding
examples.description: Demonstrates a simple health‑check that binds a PdfAnnotationEditor to a sample PDF, reads the page count, and saves the document to verify functionality.

examples.title: Prevent Flattening of PDFs with Digital Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect digital signatures using the PdfFileSignature facade and conditionally flatten a PDF only when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document to a new file.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file, delete all its annotations, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in Parallel
examples.description: Shows how to delete every annotation from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor with Parallel.ForEach.

examples.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete link annotations on pages 3‑7 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete every annotation from a PDF stream and write the cleaned PDF back to a stream.

examples.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over all pages and their annotations, and rename each annotation using a standardized prefix via the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Report PDF Annotations Grouped by Author
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, extracts all annotations, groups them by the author (the Title of markup annotations), and prints a summary report showing counts and types per author.

examples.description: Shows how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and retry the operation after rebinding the document if the first attempt fails.

examples.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
