examples.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file larger than 10 MB to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verifies that memory consumption stays within a defined limit.

examples.title: Add Large Stream Attachment to PDF with Minimal Memory Usage
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a large file as a PDF attachment using a FileStream so Aspose.Pdf reads the data in chunks, reducing memory consumption.

examples.title: Add Light Gray Background to Text Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a text annotation on a PDF page with PdfContentEditor and setting its background color to light gray for improved readability on dark pages.

examples.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp to PDF with Arial Font
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a multiline text stamp using Arial 14 pt in blue and apply it to all pages of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Multiple Annotations to a PDF in Batch
examples.description: Shows how to add a batch of text, highlight, and link annotations to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and annotation classes.

examples.title: Add Network Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
examples.description: Demonstrates how to download a file from a URL with retry on timeout and embed it as a file attachment annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add New Attachment to PDF Without Removing Existing Attachments
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a document attachment to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor while preserving any existing attachments.

examples.title: Add Page-Open JavaScript to Log Page Number
examples.description: Demonstrates attaching a JavaScript action to each PDF page that writes the current page number to the console when the page is opened, then saves the updated document.

examples.title: Add PDF Attachment with Description
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF document using PdfContentEditor, specifying a custom MIME type and description, then saving the updated file.

examples.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet List to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a closed popup annotation containing multi‑line bullet‑point text to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Add Project Overview Bookmark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a bookmark named "Project Overview" that points to page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Dash Pattern and Opacity
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a square (rectangle) annotation to the first page of a PDF, configure a custom dash border and set 75% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill
examples.description: Shows how to create a rectangle annotation with a light‑gray fill color and a 1 pt border on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor, including generation of a placeholder PDF if the source file is missing.

examples.title: Add Red Bold Text Stamp to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a bold red text stamp, center it horizontally, and apply it to page five of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Red Border Highlight Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation with a bright‑red border to a specific area of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Add Red Square Annotation with Transparency to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a square annotation with a red border and semi‑transparent fill to the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Page Four
examples.description: Shows how to create a multiline text stamp, right‑align it at the bottom of a specific page (page 4) using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API, and save the modified PDF.

examples.title: Add Rotated Semi-Transparent Image Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply an image stamp with 45° rotation, 80% opacity, and a specific (100,200) position to all pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add RTL Text Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a right‑to‑left Arabic text annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade and then save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Stamp Annotation to PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least three pages, and adds a yellow stamp annotation with 60% opacity to page three before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place a text annotation on a PDF page and set its opacity to 0.5 (50 % transparent) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Stamp Annotation with Opacity to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place a stamp annotation on a PDF page and set its opacity (and optionally blend mode) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to First PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky note (text annotation) to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Add Text Annotation with 3‑Point Border to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation with a custom 3‑point solid border to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note text annotation at coordinates (100,200) on the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Text Annotation with UTC Creation Date to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a TextAnnotation to a PDF page and setting its CreationDate to the current UTC time using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API and store custom author information in the annotation's title field.

examples.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to First PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to place a text stamp with a shadow effect at the top of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp to Page 10
examples.description: Shows how to place a centered text stamp with underline decoration and a yellow background on the tenth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply 45° Rotation to a PDF Stamp Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a rotated text stamp to all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Apply Password Protection and Disable Printing in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password using 256‑bit AES and disable all permissions, including printing, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to PDFs from JSON Config
examples.description: Shows how to read viewer preference names from a JSON configuration, map them to Aspose.Pdf ViewerPreference flags, and apply the combined settings to each PDF using PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through several PDF files and set the same viewer preferences (hide menu bar, hide toolbar, no page mode) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to an Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF using PdfFileSecurity, apply a viewer preference (e.g., hide the menu bar) with PdfContentEditor, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Assign Subject to PDF Text Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation with a Subject property to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over files in a folder and add each one as an attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Attach Network-Downloaded File to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates downloading a file into a byte array and adding it as a document attachment to an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF from JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read a JSON file that defines various annotation types, create text, link, and highlight annotations on specified pages, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alerts to Rectangle Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to process several PDF documents, locate rectangle (square) annotations on each page, and attach the same JavaScript alert action to them using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and encrypt each with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and add a red rectangle annotation to every page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Batch Add Text Watermark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to read JSON configuration and apply a text watermark to every PDF file in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
examples.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, extract all images from each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save the images into separate subfolders named after the source PDFs.

examples.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation to PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, delete all embedded attachments, and add a standardized free‑text disclaimer annotation to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in PDF Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, load each document, replace every occurrence of the word "Confidential" with "Public", and save the modified files to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top‑Center in PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, retrieve existing stamps on each page, and move them to a top‑center position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Batch Rotate PDFs Concurrently with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files in parallel, rotating each page by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
examples.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a directory and use PdfContentEditor to set the viewer preference so each PDF opens in full‑screen mode.

examples.title: Center a PDF Stamp on Page 8
examples.description: Shows how to calculate page and stamp dimensions and place a PDF stamp so it is centered horizontally and vertically on the eighth page of a document using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save
examples.description: Demonstrates how to modify viewer preferences of a PDF using PdfContentEditor and save the updated document to a new file.

examples.title: Check a Checkbox Field in a PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically set the "TermsAccepted" checkbox to true in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Compare PDF File Sizes and Validate PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare the byte sizes of an original and edited PDF and verify that both files are valid PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Convert JPEG to Single-Page PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a JPEG image and embed it into a new PDF document as a single page with default margins using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
examples.description: Shows how to extract page 7 from a PDF and save it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24-bit BMP Images
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rasterizing each page to a 24-bit BMP at a specified DPI, and saving the images to disk.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images at 150 DPI
examples.description: The example loads a PDF document and converts each page to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI, saving the images to an output folder.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to Transparent PNGs at 200 DPI
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting pages 2‑4, and converting each to a 200 DPI PNG image with a transparent background.

examples.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images with 150 DPI Using PdfConverter
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into progressive JPEG images at 150 DPI using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to convert an entire PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Thumbnails with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and render the pages to 300 DPI PNG images with a transparent background for UI thumbnails.

examples.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
examples.description: Shows how to combine a sequence of PNG files into a single PDF document, adding each image as a separate page with default margins.

examples.title: Create Dashed Border for Rectangle Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle annotation with a dashed border to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example draws each side of the rectangle as a dashed line.

examples.title: Create Nested Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a hierarchical set of bookmarks (a parent chapter with child sections) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

examples.title: Create Rubber Stamp Annotation with Custom Appearance
examples.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page and set its appearance using a custom appearance stream from another PDF via PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Create Three-Level Nested Bookmarks in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a hierarchy of section, subsection, and sub-subsection bookmarks to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create Tooltip Annotation in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note annotation with a tooltip that appears on mouse hover using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Create Custom Annotation Appearance Stream with Vector Graphic
examples.description: Builds a temporary PDF containing vector shapes and uses its bytes as a custom appearance stream for a rubber‑stamp annotation added to an existing PDF.

examples.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF, modify its content (add a text annotation), and then encrypt it again using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Delete All PDF Attachments and Verify Count
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove every attachment from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then confirm that the attachment count is zero with PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the updated file.

examples.title: Disable Zoom Controls and Set Fixed Zoom Level in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to hide PDF viewer UI elements that provide zoom controls and enforce a fixed 100% zoom level using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Embed Memory Stream as PDF Attachment using PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to add a file held in a MemoryStream as an attachment to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Enable CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
examples.description: Shows how to set the CenterWindow viewer preference so a PDF opens centered using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Attachment and Add to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF file with user and owner passwords and then attaching the encrypted document to another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to apply 128‑bit AES encryption to a PDF and forbid editing, printing and other operations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password After Adding Attachment and Viewer Preferences
examples.description: Demonstrates attaching a document, changing viewer preferences, and then encrypting the PDF with a user password using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, export them to XFDF, and serialize the XFDF XML into a JSON file for external analysis.

examples.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer Facade
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with the PdfViewer facade, optionally modify it, and save the resulting document directly to a MemoryStream for downstream processing.

examples.title: Export PDF Viewer Preferences to XML
examples.description: Shows how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF with PdfContentEditor and serialize the flags into an XML document for legacy system integration.

examples.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract the first image found on page 2 of a PDF and save it as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from each page of a PDF and save them with a page‑and‑index based naming scheme using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images embedded in a PDF document and save them as separate image files with Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from Page 5, Convert to Grayscale, and Save as JPEG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, converts page 5 to grayscale, extracts all images from that page using the PdfExtractor facade, and saves each image as a JPEG file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Verify Unicode Descriptions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded file attachments from a PDF using PdfExtractor and read their Unicode description metadata with the Document class.

examples.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to XML
examples.description: Loads a PDF, reads its viewer preference flags using PdfContentEditor, and writes the values to an XML configuration file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to JSON
examples.description: The example reads viewer preference flags and the current zoom factor from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades, translates the layout flag to a readable name, and stores the results in a JSON configuration file.

examples.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field "CustomerName"
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, fill the AcroForm text field named "CustomerName" with "Acme Corporation", and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from XML Using XPath
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting values with XPath, and populating matching AcroForm fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Configuration File
examples.description: Shows how to read default values from a simple key=value configuration file and populate a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to import field values from a JSON file into a PDF form and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Generate PDF Image Catalog with Thumbnails
examples.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF, creates a new PDF and adds each image as a 200x200 thumbnail on separate pages, optionally with a caption.

examples.title: Get PDF Viewer Preferences and Default Zoom
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preferences such as page layout and retrieve the default zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Hide Annotations and Enable Full‑Screen Viewer Preference
examples.description: Demonstrates how to hide all annotations in a PDF and set the viewer preference to full‑screen using Aspose.Pdf Document API and PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Hide PDF Menu Bar Using Viewer Preference
examples.description: Shows how to set the HideMenubar viewer preference on a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades so the menu bar is hidden when the document is opened.

examples.title: Hide PDF Navigation Panels by Setting PageMode to UseNone
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

examples.title: Hide PDF Toolbar Using Viewer Preference
examples.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference with PdfContentEditor so the toolbar is hidden when the PDF opens.

examples.title: Hide Scrollbars and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to set viewer preferences to hide UI elements such as scrollbars and to remove page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Hide Scrollbars and UI Elements in PDF Viewer
examples.description: Demonstrates using PdfContentEditor to set viewer preferences that hide scrollbars, menu bar, and toolbar for a cleaner display on small‑screen devices.

examples.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF Viewer
examples.description: Shows how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar in PDF Viewer
examples.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar and HideMenubar viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor to produce a minimalistic PDF UI.

examples.title: Import Annotations from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to deserialize annotation definitions from a JSON file, create TextAnnotation objects, and add them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new blank page at a specific position in a PDF and add a header annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Clickable Web Link into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a rectangular hyperlink that opens an external website to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Insert Image Annotation with Caption into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, place a StampAnnotation containing an image at specific coordinates, and assign a caption via the annotation's Contents property.

examples.title: Insert Line Annotation with Arrowheads in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a line annotation with arrowheads at both ends to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Lock PDF Annotation to Prevent Editing
examples.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF, set its Locked flag using Aspose.Pdf, and save the document so the annotation cannot be modified by end users.

examples.title: Log PDF Edit Operations with PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to modify a PDF and record each edit action with a timestamp and file name in a log file.

examples.title: Map PDF Viewer Preferences to Interactive Toggles
examples.description: Loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, reads its current viewer preferences, lets the user toggle individual flags via console prompts, and saves the updated preferences to a new PDF.

examples.title: Merge JPEG Images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine multiple JPEG files into a single PDF document, placing each image on its own page using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfFileMend facade.

examples.title: Merge PDFs and Add Text Annotation
examples.description: The example creates placeholder PDFs if they are missing, adds a yellow text annotation to the first PDF, and then merges the first and second PDFs into a single output file.

examples.title: Simplified PDF Editing with PdfEditorWrapper
examples.description: Demonstrates a wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor that simplifies adding annotations, replacing text, deleting images, and saving a PDF document.

examples.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Pipeline: Add Attachments, Set Viewer Preferences, and Insert Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates a configurable pipeline that loads a PDF, adds file attachments, applies viewer preference flags, and creates various annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges Using PrintDocument
examples.description: Demonstrates how to print specific page ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10) of a PDF by configuring Aspose.Pdf printing and page settings and invoking the PdfViewer.PrintDocumentWithSettings method.

examples.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
examples.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with duplex (double‑sided) mode enabled and collated multiple copies.

examples.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Multiple Copies and Landscape Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to send a PDF to the default printer, configuring two copies and landscape page orientation via printer and page settings.

examples.title: Print PDF Silently to Network Printer
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer facade and send it to a network printer identified by IP address without displaying any print dialog.

examples.title: Refresh PDF Attachments
examples.description: Shows how to delete all existing attachments from a PDF and add a new set of files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfContentEditor, deleting all embedded attachments, and saving the cleaned document.

examples.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned document.

examples.title: Remove Attachment from PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file (attachment) from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Remove PDF Attachments Matching a Filename Pattern
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate embedded file attachments whose names end with "_old.pdf", delete those attachments, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Moving Last Page to First
examples.description: Shows how to move the last page of a PDF to the beginning of the document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor Insert and Delete methods.

examples.title: Replace MM/DD/YYYY Dates with YYYY-MM-DD in PDF using Regex
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor with a regular expression to locate dates in MM/DD/YYYY format and replace them with YYYY‑MM‑DD across all pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Replace "Draft" with "Final" in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using PdfContentEditor to replace all occurrences of a word, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Replace InvoiceNumber with UUID on PDF Page 6
examples.description: Shows how to replace the exact case‑sensitive text "InvoiceNumber" on a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document.

examples.title: Replace Phrase with Bold Style While Preserving Font Size
examples.description: Shows how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF, retrieve its original font size, and replace it with a new bold‑styled phrase using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text inside annotation contents on selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the Facades API.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, replacing all occurrences of a string, and saving the edited document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor within a using block for automatic disposal.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF with PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to replace text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and ensures the editor is disposed in a finally block to prevent memory leaks.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Replace Text on Page While Preserving Font Style
examples.description: Shows how to locate a text fragment on page 2, capture its original TextState, and replace it with new text while keeping the original font, size, and color using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

examples.title: Replace Text While Preserving Font Style in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text in a PDF using PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font, size, and color on the affected pages.

examples.title: Replace Text Using Regular Expressions Across PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace text that matches a regular expression on all pages of a PDF while preserving the original formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reposition Stamp on PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF 10 mm from the left margin with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Reposition Stamp to Paragraph Baseline on Page 5
examples.description: Shows how to locate the baseline of the first paragraph on page 5 using TextFragmentAbsorber and then move an existing stamp so its Y‑coordinate aligns with that baseline.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the viewer preference flags from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and output them to the console.

examples.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Incremental Edits
examples.description: Shows how to modify PDF viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor and read back the current preference value after each change.

examples.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation 90 Degrees Clockwise
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF and rotate it 90° clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF and rotate it 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

examples.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to use continuous (single‑column) view mode using PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set Express Shipping Radio Button in PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to select the 'Express' option of the 'ShippingMethod' radio button in a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF's current viewer preferences, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Multiple Viewer Preferences for a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine viewer preferences (CenterWindow and HideToolbar) using a bitwise OR, apply them to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, and save the result.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades so the document opens automatically in full‑screen mode.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Restrict Editing and Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to configure document privileges that enable text copying while disabling form field editing and annotation modifications.

examples.title: Set PDF Title and Enable DisplayDocTitle Viewer Preference
examples.description: Loads a PDF, sets its document title, and applies the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the window caption.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outline Panel
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's viewer preference to display the document outline (bookmarks) by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single-page layout and save the modified file.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to enable the thumbnails pane, fit the window to the page width, and set a default zoom factor for a PDF document.

examples.title: Set Viewer Preference to Continuous Layout with 100% Zoom
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preference to a single‑page continuous layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Certificate and Encrypt Using Certificate‑Based Encryption
examples.description: The example signs a PDF using a PKCS#1 certificate and then encrypts the signed document with certificate‑based AES‑256 encryption, requiring a digital signature to open the file.

examples.title: Split Edited PDF into Single-Page Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split a PDF into separate one-page documents, preserving any annotations on each page.

examples.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, toggle the FullScreen viewer preference using PdfContentEditor, and save the modified file.

examples.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on page 4 of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's text extraction and Facades markup APIs.

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve existing XMP metadata from a PDF, modify the Dublin Core creator field, and save the PDF with the updated metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata with Custom Project Schema
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, registering a custom XMP namespace, adding project identifier and version fields, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor and confirming its presence after saving using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

examples.title: Verify Text Annotation Position in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextAnnotation, saves it, then loads the PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor to assert that the annotation's rectangle coordinates match the expected values.

examples.title: Persist Viewer Preferences After Editing PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set viewer preferences on a PDF using PdfContentEditor, save the changes, and verify that the preferences persist after reopening the document.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to extract all text and images from a PDF file asynchronously by wrapping Aspose.Pdf's blocking PdfExtractor calls in Task.Run, keeping UI threads responsive.

examples.title: Azure Function to Extract Text from PDFs in a Queue
examples.description: Shows a scheduled Azure Function that reads a PDF blob name from an Azure Storage queue, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and uploads the extracted text as a .txt file to another blob container.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a folder and write each result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction
examples.description: Processes all PDF files in a specified folder, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and saves each result as a .txt file with the same base name.

examples.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while allowing the user to abort the operation via a CancellationToken triggered by a key press.

examples.title: Check if PDF Contains Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF into a MemoryStream and determine if any text is present by checking the stream length.

examples.title: Check PDF for Text and Images
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains both textual content and images.

examples.title: Check if PDF Is Text‑Only by Extracting Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to detect whether a PDF contains any images, thereby determining if the document is text‑only.

examples.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Shows how to extract text, images, and attachments from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while toggling each operation through a JSON configuration file.

examples.title: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to determine the total number of pages, embedded images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

examples.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF with Image Thumbnails
examples.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, arranges them as thumbnails on a grid, and saves the result as a new contact sheet PDF.

examples.title: Create PDF Summary with First Three Pages Text
examples.description: Extracts text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and builds a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary.

examples.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG (Quality 85)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract each page image from a PDF and save it as a JPEG file with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

examples.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from every page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor by setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 to process all pages.

examples.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each attachment to a specified output directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages Containing a Keyword
examples.description: Demonstrates how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword and, only when the keyword is found, extract all images from that page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images and Build PDF Portfolio
examples.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF, saves them as temporary PNG files, and creates a new PDF where each image occupies its own page, forming a portfolio document.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and combine them into a single PNG sprite sheet.

examples.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and extract all resource‑based images from a PDF using the PdfExtractor facade.

examples.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

examples.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF with Password
examples.description: Shows how to set the user password on a PdfExtractor and extract all images from an encrypted PDF document.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
examples.description: The example extracts all images from each page of a PDF, saves them as PNG files, and creates a CSV file that lists each image's filename, page number, and displayed dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from pages 5 through 10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Output as Base64 JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting each image to a Base64 string, and saving the images with metadata to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them as PNG files to a UNC network folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image as a PNG with a unique GUID filename to avoid naming collisions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them into a temporary directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate a Markdown Gallery
examples.description: The sample extracts all raster images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as JPEG files, and creates a Markdown file that displays the images as a simple gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using the Facades API, sends each image to the OpenAI OCR copilot, and saves the recognized text to separate files.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded images from a PDF while preserving their original format.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Video Slideshow
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then generate a video slideshow from the extracted pictures with FFmpeg.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting embedded images from each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, saving them to files, and generating a CSV manifest with file name, page number, and image dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and generates a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images in a gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and generate PNG thumbnails limited to 200 pixels in size.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting the image streams to Base64 strings, and serializing the collection to JSON.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them directly into an HTML report via data URIs.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create PDF/A‑2b Document with Embedded XObjects
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embedding each image on new pages as XObjects, and converting the result to a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save each one as a lossless TIFF file for archival storage.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP Archive
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and store them as PNG files inside a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Using Block
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor within a using block for automatic disposal. The example creates an in‑memory PDF, binds it to the extractor, and saves each image to a folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Validate Their Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade and verifying each saved image's file signature to ensure it is not corrupted.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF After Adding Watermark
examples.description: The example adds a full‑page image watermark to each page of a PDF, saves the result to a temporary file, and then extracts all images (including the watermark) as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by Extension
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded files from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save them into subfolders grouped by their original file extensions.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, saving them to disk, and calculating a SHA-256 hash for each file to verify integrity.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Compress as PNG ZIP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them as PNG files, and then compress the resulting images into a ZIP archive with lossless compression.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Save as BMP with Original Resolution
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting embedded images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, setting a high DPI, and saving each image as a BMP file while preserving its original color depth.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to Azure Blob
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading each image to an Azure Blob container with the Azure.Storage.Blobs SDK.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract all images from a PDF file and upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract images from a PDF and upload each image to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and upload the resulting JPEG streams to an Amazon S3 bucket with the AWS SDK.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images to a UNC Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save them to a UNC‑formatted network share, creating the destination folder if needed.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Encrypt with AES
examples.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then encrypt the resulting .txt file with AES (CBC, 256‑bit) before saving.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Save Each Page to Separate Files
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF document and write the text of each page into individual .txt files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract Unicode text from a PDF and write it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all text from a PDF document and then store the extracted content in Azure Table storage (using a stub implementation).

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream for compressed storage.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, extracting its text with PdfExtractor, and writing the result to another MemoryStream for in‑memory processing.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF in memory, extracting its full text with Aspose.Pdf, and inserting the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder and Save to File
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF into a StringBuilder using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, then writing the accumulated text to a Unicode text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter for Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF file and write the result into a StringWriter, which can be fed to logging frameworks.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text with Progress Indicator
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade while displaying a progress percentage based on the total page count.

examples.title: Extract and Rename PDF Attachments with Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, prepend a timestamp to each filename, and save them to disk.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to receive PDF data over a TCP socket and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull out page text and embedded images directly from a stream without creating temporary files.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PdfExtractor, bind a PDF file, and simultaneously extract all text to a file and all images to separate PNG files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to read a PDF stored in a byte array, extract its text, and return it as a string without any file system access.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF document and save it as a UTF-8 encoded .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF file and output it to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF into a memory stream, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text, and return the text as a JSON payload.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF file, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates a batch job that reads PDF files from an Azure Blob container, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads the resulting .txt files back to Blob storage.

examples.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
examples.description: Shows how to set the owner password on a PdfExtractor, bind an encrypted PDF, and extract its text to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF by not calling the image extraction methods.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDFs using Aspose PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read PDF files, extract the full text and all embedded images, and save them to a structured output directory.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream and Forward to Generator
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving it into a MemoryStream, and preparing the stream for use by another PDF generation library.

examples.title: Extract Text to Temporary File and Verify Content
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saving it to a temporary file, reading it back, and confirming the extracted content matches the original extraction.

examples.title: Handle Errors When Binding a Corrupted PDF with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify a PDF file's existence and use try‑catch blocks to handle specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions that occur when PdfExtractor attempts to bind a corrupted PDF.

examples.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfExtractor to retrieve the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without saving the files.

examples.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from several PDF documents concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor together with Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

examples.title: Unit Test for Extracting Text with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF file and verify the result with a simple MSTest unit test.

examples.title: Report Progress While Extracting Text from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a large PDF while reporting progress to the console.

examples.title: Retry Text Extraction from PDF with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and implement a three‑attempt retry loop that handles IOException.

examples.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Affects Extracted Image Count
examples.description: Creates a PDF containing a visible and a hidden image, then uses PdfExtractor with different ExtractImageMode settings to demonstrate that DefinedInResources returns all images while ActuallyUsed returns only the images placed on the page.

examples.title: Add Date Header to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp to insert a header with the current date on every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Image Watermark to Filled PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and then apply a semi‑transparent image watermark to every page of the resulting document.

examples.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from Excel Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates loading Excel data asynchronously, binding it to a PDF template with AutoFiller, and writing the filled PDF to disk using async file I/O.

examples.title: AutoFiller PDF Merge with Retry Logic
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, and save the merged document while handling transient file‑access errors with an exponential back‑off retry mechanism.

examples.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill a single PDF form template repeatedly using a list of DataTable objects, creating a separate filled PDF for each data set.

examples.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller Instance
examples.description: Shows how to create an AutoFiller object, bind a source PDF form from a file path, and prepare it for further operations such as importing data or saving the filled PDF.

examples.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array without Saving to Disk
examples.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and save it directly to a MemoryStream to obtain a byte array for web API transmission.

examples.title: Convert Large PDF to Excel Using a Temporary Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates processing a large PDF by extracting each page to temporary files, concatenating them, and converting the combined PDF to an Excel workbook while using disk buffering to limit memory usage.

examples.title: Encrypt Filled PDF with Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to protect a previously filled PDF by applying user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API. The example saves the filled document and then encrypts it with AES‑256 encryption and specific privileges.

examples.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom File Names from DataTable
examples.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a multi‑page PDF and save each page as a separate PDF file using file names taken from a DataTable column.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading data from a CSV file into a DataTable and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to populate matching PDF form fields, then saving the filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable (Excel‑derived)
examples.description: Shows how to create a DataTable (simulating Excel column headers) and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import the table data, and save the filled PDF form.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Large CSV Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a large CSV (converted from XLSX) row‑by‑row into a DataTable and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form without exhausting memory.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template from a byte array, filling its form fields with data via Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller, and saving the result—all in memory without intermediate files.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Multiple CSV Worksheets
examples.description: The example reads each CSV file (representing an Excel worksheet) into a DataTable and uses Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form, generating a separate filled PDF for each worksheet.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from XLSX Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to create a DataTable (simulating XLSX data) and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import the data, and save a filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using CSV Data with Configurable Column Mapping
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON mapping to translate CSV column names to PDF field names, reading the first data row, and filling an Aspose.Pdf form dynamically.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable and Validate File Size
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller to populate a PDF form from a DataTable, creating a template if missing, and checking that the resulting PDF does not exceed a predefined size limit.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Proper Disposal
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, fill form fields using AutoFiller, and automatically release unmanaged resources with a using statement.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable with Custom Columns
examples.description: Demonstrates adding custom columns to a DataTable, binding it to a PDF template with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, and saving the filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Handle Exceptions
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a template PDF, import a DataTable into form fields, save the filled document, and capture missing file or PDF errors with exception handling.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and abort the operation with a cancellation token if it exceeds a specified timeout.

examples.title: Format Numeric Values and Fill PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to format numeric DataTable values as strings and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate PDF form fields.

examples.title: Generate PDF with One Page per DataTable Row
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import a DataTable and create a merged PDF where each row is rendered on a separate page, then validates the page count.

examples.title: Generate Subset PDF from Filtered DataTable
examples.description: Creates a DataTable (simulating an exported Excel worksheet), filters rows by a column value, and writes the filtered data into a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Summary Report Mapping PDF Pages to DataTable Rows
examples.description: Iterates through each PDF page, extracts tables with TableAbsorber, and writes a CSV that maps the page number to a corresponding DataTable row identifier.

examples.title: Import DataTable with ReadOnly and Unique Columns into PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to configure DataColumn properties such as ReadOnly and Unique, then import the DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

examples.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form using AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF form template, import a DataTable whose column names match AcroForm fields, and save the filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller.

examples.title: Log DataTable Row Processing While Generating PDFs with AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill a PDF template from a DataTable, create a separate PDF per row, and log each processed row with its page number.

examples.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Field Names for AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers and then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template automatically.

examples.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
examples.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form from DataTables using AutoFiller and then concatenate the generated PDFs into one consolidated file with PdfFileEditor.

examples.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
examples.description: Shows how to load a previously filled PDF using the Form facade and save it to a new file, keeping the original layout unchanged.

examples.title: Split Filled PDF into Single‑Page PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a filled PDF into individual one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Import
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify that all required fields in a PDF form have matching columns in a DataTable before filling the form using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Unit Test to Verify Filled PDF Fields Match DataTable
examples.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and then use a unit test to compare each filled field against the original DataTable values.

examples.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form submit button using Aspose.Pdf to show a confirmation dialog before posting the form.

examples.title: Add Text Field "CustomerName" to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text form field named CustomerName to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
