examples.title: Assign Page Transitions Based on Content Type
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages and apply different transition effects depending on whether the page contains images, form XObjects, or other content using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Batch Change PDF Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files in a folder and set a specific page size for each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to resize multiple PDF files to A4 dimensions and save the results with a suffix.

examples.title: Batch Rotate First Page of PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and rotate the first page of each document by 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Center Align and Zoom Page 4 of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to center‑align the content and apply a 150% zoom to a specific page (page 4) of a PDF document.

examples.title: Center Content Horizontally on Second PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to horizontally center a text fragment on the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HorizontalAlignment property.

examples.title: Center Page Content and Set Display Duration on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to center the content of a specific PDF page and set its display duration to four seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Chain Page Rotation, Size, and Zoom Modifications
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, set a new page size, and apply a zoom factor in a single operation before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Change PDF Page Orientation to Landscape
examples.description: Loads a PDF, sets each page's dimensions to A4 landscape size, and saves the document, converting the orientation from portrait to landscape.

examples.title: Check Page Rotation Before and After Resizing a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a PDF page's rotation, change the page size using PdfPageEditor, and verify that the rotation value remains unchanged.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page's orientation from portrait to landscape by swapping the width and height via the PageSize property and rotating the content 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with 15% Uniform Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with uniform 15% margins on all sides using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with absolute margins of five points on each side, ready to be used with PdfFileEditor methods.

examples.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF slideshow by applying transition effects and display durations to each page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Create Preview and Final PDFs with Different Zoom Levels
examples.description: Shows how to generate a preview PDF at 50% zoom and a final PDF at 100% zoom using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, with automatic creation of a sample source PDF if it is missing.

examples.title: Disable Page Transition Animation on a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for page 6 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

examples.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF in a MemoryStream, apply zoom and rotation with PdfPageEditor, and save the edited PDF to another MemoryStream.

examples.title: Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor and Save to New File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfPageEditor, applying zoom and rotation to all pages, and saving the edited document to a new file.

examples.title: Edit PDF and Preserve Original with Backup
examples.description: Shows how to create a backup of a PDF, modify the original using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor, and save the edited version as a new file while keeping the source unchanged.

examples.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates catching an InvalidValueFormatException when assigning an unsupported rotation value to a PDF page using PdfPageEditor and then applying a valid rotation.

examples.title: In-Memory PDF Page Manipulation with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, rotating a page using PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited document back to a stream without using the file system.

examples.title: Left Align Content of Page Two in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Load and Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file using PdfPageEditor, apply rotation and zoom settings, and save the edited document.

examples.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotations Before and After Edit
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to record each page's size and rotation before and after applying edits, writing the audit information to a text file.

examples.title: Log PDF Page Property Changes Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to modify page properties such as zoom, rotation, and size with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and record each modification to a log file for audit and debugging.

examples.title: Merge PDFs with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to apply consistent margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Modify PDF Pages While Preserving Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect an existing digital signature in a PDF and rotate a specific page using PdfPageEditor, saving the document with an incremental update so the signature remains valid.

examples.title: Report PDF Page Properties Before and After Edits
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, prints each page's width, height, rotation and zoom, applies rotation, zoom and page‑size changes using PdfPageEditor, saves the edited file, and then prints the updated page properties.

examples.title: Reset Rotation of a PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of a specific PDF page (page 6) to 0 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents and Rotate by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to shrink the contents of a PDF page to 80 % of its original size and then rotate the page 90° using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
examples.description: Shows how to identify pages that contain any text and then resize the contents of only those pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of a single PDF page (page 6) to the Letter format and save the result.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapter Files
examples.description: Shows how to uniformly shrink the contents of a PDF and then split the resized document into separate chapter PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's ContentsResizeParameters to apply different left, right, top, and bottom margins when resizing the contents of a PDF document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Contents with Mixed Percentage and Absolute Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents using a combination of percentage‑based and absolute margins, creating a hybrid resizing effect.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 5% Negative Margin
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to shrink the contents of every page to 95% of the original size, applying a uniform 5% negative margin.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Top and Bottom Margins
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages by applying different top and bottom margin percentages.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying equal percentage margins on every side and saving the result.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page and Undo Changes Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates changing a PDF page to a custom size with PdfPageEditor, saving the result, then restoring the original size to test undo functionality.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
examples.description: Shows how to enlarge the margins of every page in a PDF by 10% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents with default margin parameters.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to change the page size of a PDF using PdfPageEditor so that annotations and interactive elements remain functional after resizing.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to A3 Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to change the size of all pages in a PDF to A3 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, changes its page size to A4 with PdfPageEditor, and saves the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages to US Letter Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to change the page size of selected pages (3‑6) to US Letter dimensions and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages with Custom Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of selected PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) using custom left and right margins via the PdfFileEditor facade.

examples.title: Retrieve Rotation Angle of a PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfPageEditor and get the rotation angle of page 4 using GetPageRotation.

examples.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
examples.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page with PdfPageEditor and then read the updated page dimensions to verify the new orientation.

examples.title: Retrieve Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor, obtain the width and height of a specific page, and log the dimensions.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Page Sizes with Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to obtain the dimensions of specific PDF pages and safely handle requests for non‑existent pages using try‑catch blocks.

examples.title: Revert PDF Page Size to Original Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to capture a page's original size, modify it, and then restore the original dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Rotate Encrypted PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, rotate all pages by 90 degrees using PdfPageEditor, and save the edited document.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page to Landscape
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade, resulting in alternating landscape orientation.

examples.title: Rotate Landscape PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Detects pages with landscape orientation in a PDF and rotates them 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade. The modified document is then saved to a new file.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page and Reset Orientation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page using PdfPageEditor, save the change, and then restore the original page orientation.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page While Preserving Transition Effect
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using PdfPageEditor while keeping any existing transition settings intact.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Stream and Save Back
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a network stream, rotate its pages using PdfPageEditor, and write the modified PDF back to the same stream.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate all pages 90° clockwise and set the page size to landscape A4 for brochure printing.

examples.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to rotate every page of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor, applying the changes, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor with Proper Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates rotating all pages of a PDF by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and correctly disposing the editor and document to release resources.

examples.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF with Validation
examples.description: Shows how to validate a rotation angle (0, 90, 180, 270) and apply it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of a PDF by 90° using the PdfPageEditor facade and keep existing form field data by exporting to FDF before rotation and importing it back afterward.

examples.title: Rotate and Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 by 90° and change its dimensions to Letter size in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate, Resize and Zoom PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to rotate pages, change the page size, apply a zoom factor, and save the transformed PDF.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to rotate page 2 of a PDF by 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor PageRotations dictionary.

examples.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, applying a page edit (zoom), and saving the modified document directly to a MemoryStream to avoid disk I/O.

examples.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with read/write access, apply modifications via the PdfFileMend facade, and save the document using incremental update to keep the original file structure.

examples.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a BoxOut page transition and a zoom factor of 1.3 to page 2 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Cover Transition on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a one‑second Cover page transition to page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Custom Page Size with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard values using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Display Duration for Even PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to apply a custom display duration exclusively to even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Display Duration for a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the display duration of page 5 to five seconds for a PDF slideshow.

examples.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Slideshow Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration for each page in a PDF to create a timed slideshow using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Fade Transition for All PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a two‑second Fade transition to every page of a PDF using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Last Page Size to A5 for Booklet PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change the last page's dimensions to A5 for a compact booklet format, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set Page Content Alignment Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, or right) of existing PDF page content using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
examples.description: Shows how to apply a transition to each PDF page and adjust the transition duration according to the length of the page title using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Page Transition Duration for Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to specify a range of pages using the PdfPageEditor facade and set each page's transition duration to one second.

examples.title: Set Page Zoom to 150% Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the zoom level of a specific PDF page (page 3) to 150% using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size to A4 Landscape Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change all pages of a PDF to a custom A4 landscape size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
examples.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions using the PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom level of all pages in a PDF to 1.0 (100%) using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using Double Precision
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a zoom factor to a PDF using PdfPageEditor, casting a double to the required float for high‑resolution scaling.

examples.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
examples.description: Shows how to calculate a display duration for each PDF page proportional to its word count and apply the duration using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a different display duration to each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second per page.

examples.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Presentation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a fixed display time (in seconds) to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page to 75%
examples.description: Shows how to change the zoom level of page 5 in a PDF to 75% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Set Zoom on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 2.0 (200%) zoom to page 7 of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Vertically Align Content on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to center the existing content of page 3 vertically using PdfPageEditor’s VerticalAlignment property.

examples.title: Vertically Align Page 3 to Top Using PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to align the content of the third page of a PDF document to the top edge.

examples.title: Zoom Even Pages of PDF to 1.2x
examples.description: Shows how to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Zoom Even-Numbered PDF Pages to 80%
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reduce the visual size of all even-numbered pages in a PDF by applying a 0.8 zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

examples.title: Zoom Odd Pages of PDF to 120%
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to only the odd-numbered pages of a PDF and save the modified document.

examples.title: Zoom PDF Pages Containing Images
examples.description: Detects pages that contain at least one image and applies a zoom factor only to those pages using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to apply a common zoom factor to specific non‑consecutive pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Apply Password Protection to an Existing PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using 256‑bit AES, and save the protected document without recreating it.

examples.title: Apply Print Privilege to PDF and Disable Internal Exceptions
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to set a print privilege on a PDF while turning off internal exception handling so that runtime exceptions are propagated.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a configuration file and decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in batch using the owner password with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, applying the same user and owner passwords and a 256‑bit AES encryption.

examples.title: Change User and Owner Passwords for PDFs from CSV
examples.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing PDF paths and passwords, then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to change both user and owner passwords and save the secured PDFs.

examples.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF file in a single call using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.title: Change PDF User Password in Bulk
examples.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Change PDF User Password While Preserving Encryption
examples.description: Shows how to change the user password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, keeping the existing encryption settings unchanged.

examples.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to determine if a PDF contains extended usage rights.

examples.title: Decrypt, Modify, and Save PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, decrypt it if it is password‑protected using PdfFileSecurity, add a text fragment to the first page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password from Azure Key Vault
examples.description: Demonstrates retrieving an owner password stored in Azure Key Vault and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to decrypt a protected PDF file.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to remove encryption from a PDF by providing the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.DecryptFile.

examples.title: Disable Copying While Enabling High-Resolution Printing for PDF
examples.description: Shows how to forbid copying and allow high‑resolution printing on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF with Verification
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using user and owner passwords with 256‑bit AES, then decrypting it and confirming round‑trip integrity by comparing the original and decrypted file sizes.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and passwords
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, providing user and owner passwords and setting a document privilege with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Upload to Azure Blob
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity with AES‑256 and uploading the encrypted stream to Azure Blob Storage.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 while applying specific document privileges in a single operation with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Files and Log Execution Time
examples.description: The example loads each PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, saves the encrypted file, and logs the time taken for the encryption operation.

examples.title: Encrypt PDFs Based on File Name
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by selecting the CryptoAlgorithm and key size from naming conventions, then saving the encrypted output.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, applying AES‑256 encryption with optional passwords, and returning the encrypted PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Enable Print/Edit Privileges
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine print and edit privileges for a PDF and encrypt the document using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF with a user password using the RC4‑40 algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and writing the encrypted document into a MemoryStream for network transmission.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade, returning the encrypted PDF in a MemoryStream.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Capture Exceptions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using PdfFileSecurity, enable AllowExceptions to capture errors, and log detailed exception information.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only a user password, letting the library generate a random owner password and applying 256‑bit AES encryption.

examples.title: Generate Encryption Summary for PDF Files
examples.description: Iterates over a set of PDF documents, determines whether each file is encrypted, captures the (unknown) encryption algorithm, extracts document privilege settings, and writes the information to a CSV summary file.

examples.title: Load and Verify PDF Using PdfFileInfo Facade
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with the PdfFileInfo facade, retrieve the Document, and confirm it contains at least one page.

examples.title: Monitor Folder and Encrypt PDFs to Secure Archive
examples.description: Demonstrates how to watch a directory for new PDF files, encrypt them with user/owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and move the encrypted files to a secure archive folder.

examples.title: Generate PDF Encryption Usage Report
examples.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to determine if each PDF is encrypted, and writes a text report showing the encryption status and algorithm information.

examples.title: Remove Extended Usage Rights from Signed PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, detect extended usage rights, remove them with PdfFileSignature.RemoveUsageRights, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Remove and Verify Usage Rights in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, removes its usage rights, checks whether any usage rights remain, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using the Facades API and read its CryptoAlgorithm property to determine the encryption algorithm, if any.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing and Disallow Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to enable printing while disabling copying in a PDF and saving the modified file.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges: Enable Form Filling, Disable Assembly
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply document privileges to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, enabling form filling while disabling document assembly.

examples.title: Test Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then verify that decryption throws an InvalidPasswordException when an incorrect owner password is supplied, using a unit test.

examples.title: Toggle PDF Encryption Based on Current State
examples.description: The example checks if a PDF is encrypted using PdfFileInfo.IsEncrypted, then either decrypts it with the owner password or encrypts it with user and owner passwords, demonstrating conditional security handling.

examples.title: Update Owner Password of a Protected PDF
examples.description: Shows how to change the owner password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf without modifying the existing user password or permissions.

examples.title: Update Owner Passwords of Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the owner password of several PDF files while preserving their existing user passwords, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

examples.title: Validate and Decrypt Encrypted PDF
examples.description: The example checks if a PDF is encrypted using PdfFileInfo; if it is, it decrypts the file with the owner password via PdfFileSecurity, otherwise it simply copies the original file.

examples.title: Add Second Digital Signature on Page 3 of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply two digital signatures to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with the second signature placed on page three in a custom rectangle.

examples.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a signature field on a specific page using FormEditor, and digitally signing the document with a PKCS#7 certificate.

examples.title: Create an Invisible Digital Signature in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using a hidden appearance, preserving cryptographic validity without any visual signature.

examples.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
examples.description: Shows how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by configuring a custom signature appearance.

examples.title: Configure Custom Signature Appearance with Image and Background Color
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate while customizing the visible signature appearance with a foreground image and a background color.

examples.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, configure a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Reason and Location
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to digitally sign a PDF, specifying the signature reason as 'Approved for release' and the location as 'New York'.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the X.509 certificate information such as issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Shows how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the associated X509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG

examples.title: Update PDF XMP BaseURL from Request Host

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata and Save
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add or update standard and custom XMP metadata properties, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Update XMP Property in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, modify or add an XMP metadata property, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its XMP metadata, verifies required Dublin Core fields, runs PDF/A‑1B validation, and saves the document only when all checks succeed.

examples.title: Validate PDF XMP Metadata Against XSD Schema
examples.description: Extracts XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and validates it against an XSD schema, logging any validation errors.

examples.title: Write and Verify Custom PDF Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add custom XMP metadata entries (BaseUrl, CreatorTool, Nickname) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save the updated file, and read the values back to verify them.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript timeout in a PDF that automatically closes the document after a specified number of milliseconds using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Print JavaScript Action to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action that automatically opens the print dialog when the PDF is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at defined intervals using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as project code and department, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Document-Level JavaScript Expiry Action to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document-level JavaScript action that checks an expiry date and closes the PDF when opened.

examples.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a file as an attachment, encrypt the PDF (including the attachment) with user and owner passwords, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a PDF document as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Total Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item fields and display the result in a total field.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to prompt the user for a password on document open, enhancing security.

examples.title: Add JavaScript to Toggle Optional Sections in a PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf to show or hide optional fields based on a checkbox (or dropdown) selection.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the viewer automatically jumps to page 10 when the document is opened.

examples.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a page-level JavaScript action that shows an alert when a specific PDF page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to place a semi-transparent watermark text behind existing page content on every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
examples.description: Shows how to embed required XMP metadata (DocumentID and CreatorTool) into a PDF and convert the document to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF with Descriptions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type (documented), description, and icon using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A‑3B
examples.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice into a PDF as an attached file with the correct AFRelationship and then convert the PDF to PDF/A‑3B using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert every page of each PDF file in a folder to separate JPEG images using Aspose.PDF, naming the output files after the source PDF.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply identical user and owner passwords with specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD-Compliant Invoice PDFs from CSV
examples.description: Shows how to read invoice data from a CSV file, create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and embed the corresponding ZUGFeRD XML into each PDF.

examples.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction and In-Memory Search Index
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF files, extract their full text using Aspose.Pdf, and store the results in an in‑memory dictionary for quick keyword searches.

examples.title: Calculate Total Order Amount from PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF form fields, sum line‑item values, and write the calculated total back into a form field using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place four Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph objects in a 2×2 grid on one PDF page, adding a simple shape and a title to each graph.

examples.title: Compress Images and Optimize PDF Size
examples.description: Shows how to reduce a PDF's file size by compressing images, limiting resolution, and removing unused objects using Aspose.Pdf optimization options.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting the first page, and rendering it to a 300 DPI PNG image.

examples.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while preserving the original layout, fonts, and tables.

examples.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Base64 Images
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single HTML document using Aspose.Pdf, embedding raster images as Base64‑encoded PNGs inside SVG wrappers and embedding all resources into the HTML.

examples.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Enhanced Anti-Aliasing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling advanced anti-aliasing to produce smoother graphics.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page into a multi‑page TIFF file using a specified resolution and TIFF settings.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b Compliance
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑2b compliance with a conversion log, and save the resulting archival‑ready file.

examples.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD Attachment to PDF/A‑3u
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment and converting it to PDF/A‑3u while preserving the embedded data using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Bar Chart in PDF with Custom Colors and Axis Labels
examples.description: This example shows how to generate a bar chart inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API, applying custom fill colors, axis lines, tick marks, and labels.

examples.title: Create Line Graph with Different Stroke Styles in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a Graph to a PDF and draw three lines with solid, dashed, and dotted stroke styles using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
examples.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a digital signature field, and attaches JavaScript that validates the signature when the field is activated.

examples.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Clickable Headings
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a Table of Contents page into an existing PDF and add clickable heading entries that link to their respective pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF invoice template, embed ZUGFeRD XML data, and convert the document to a PDF/A‑3 ZUGFeRD‑compliant PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Delete Specific PDF Operators from Page Content
examples.description: Shows how to remove unwanted operators from a PDF page's content stream using Aspose.Pdf's OperatorCollection.

examples.title: Digitally Sign a ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a PKCS#7 digital signature and a trusted timestamp to a ZUGFeRD PDF using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Draw Custom Star Shape with PDF Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use low‑level PDF operators in Aspose.Pdf to draw a 5‑pointed star at specific coordinates, including setting fill and stroke colors and line width.

examples.title: Draw Pie Chart Using Low-Level PDF Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a pie chart in a PDF by manually constructing slice paths and filling them with distinct colors using Aspose.Pdf low‑level operators.

examples.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Header and Footer via JavaScript
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add shared form fields for a header and footer and assign JavaScript actions that update their text on each page when the PDF is opened.

examples.title: Embed Audio in PDF with Sound Annotation and JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to embed a WAV audio file into a PDF using a SoundAnnotation and add JavaScript that plays the audio automatically when the document opens.

examples.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF with Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding it into a PDF, and using it together with a simple graph drawn via Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed QR Code Image Using Low‑Level PDF Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a QR code image to a specific location in a PDF by inserting low‑level graphics operators (q, cm, Do, Q) with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed Vector Graphic (Graph) into PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a Graph container, add rectangle and line shapes, and embed the resulting vector graphic directly onto a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying both user and owner passwords and configuring document permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only printing is allowed while content copying and annotation modifications are disabled.

examples.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, set permissions, and save the encrypted file.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export all its annotations to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

examples.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files

examples.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, absorb image placements, and save each embedded image in its original resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates reading fillable form fields from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and serializing the field names and values into a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF with Line Breaks Preserved
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all textual content from a PDF while preserving line breaks and spacing using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and extraction options.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file, flatten the form to make fields read‑only, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages

examples.title: Hide Form Field with Checkbox Using JavaScript
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox and a text box to a PDF and use a JavaScript action to hide or show the text box based on the checkbox state.

examples.title: Import FDF Data into PDF and Flatten Form
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing field values from an FDF file, flattening the form to make fields static, and saving the result.

examples.title: List JavaScript Actions in a PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate all embedded file attachments, and output each attachment's name and size in bytes.

examples.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Bookmarks Preserved

examples.description: Shows how to print a selected range of PDF pages to a network printer using Aspose.Pdf, configuring duplex mode and custom paper size.

examples.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts only custom metadata entries, and writes them to a log file for auditing purposes.

examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only form filling is permitted while editing, printing, and content extraction are disabled.

examples.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a custom TrueType font, marking it for embedding and subsetting, adding text with that font, and subsetting all fonts to reduce the PDF file size.

examples.description: Shows how to apply an image watermark with 20% opacity to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers with a custom "Page X of Y" format on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
