examples.description: Shows how to add uppercase Roman‑numeral page numbers to the introductory pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
examples.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the middle of a PDF document and batch‑insert ten blank pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Transparent Separator Page into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add an empty PDF page with a transparent background as a separator between sections using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF by extracting all even‑numbered pages and appending them to the end while preserving their original order.

examples.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to reposition page 9 to the beginning of a PDF by inserting it at index 1 and removing the original page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to relocate pages 3 through 6 to the end of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf in a single operation.

examples.title: Move PDF Page Between Documents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to transfer a single page from one PDF file to another while preserving its rotation, size, and other page properties, then saves the updated source and target documents.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without modifying or saving the document.

examples.title: Read and Log PDF Page Dimensions
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, obtains its width and height, and writes the dimensions to the console.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
examples.description: Loads a PDF file and iterates through each page to output its width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete all Bates numbering stamps from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove Existing Bates Numbering and Add New Sequence to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then apply a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Existing Headers/Footers and Add New Ones to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to clear any existing header and footer on each page of a PDF and then assign new header and footer text using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using a Custom Sequence
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reorder pages of a PDF by copying them into a new document according to a user-defined integer array.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, copy its pages into a new document in reverse (descending) order, and save the reordered file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
examples.description: Loads a PDF, separates its pages into landscape and portrait groups, and creates a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages.

examples.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5 Size
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's pages and resize each one to A5 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to change the size of page 7 in a PDF document to the Letter format using Aspose.Pdf's SetPageSize method.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
examples.description: Demonstrates how to resize each page of a PDF to a target size (595 × 842 points) using Aspose.Pdf, scaling the content proportionally.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a template PDF to obtain page dimensions and then resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
examples.description: Loads a PDF, determines the largest page dimensions, and resizes all pages to match those dimensions for a uniform layout.

examples.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Loads a PDF, checks each page's width, and resizes only pages wider than 600 points to A4 size while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

examples.title: Retrieve TrimBox After Cropping a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates setting a CropBox on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, reading the resulting TrimBox coordinates, and saving the cropped document.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every page of a PDF by 180° using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating pages whose numbers are divisible by three by 90°, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the fourth page, rotate it 90° clockwise using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating individual pages based on a dictionary of page numbers to angles, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and set a 90° clockwise rotation for odd‑numbered pages while leaving even pages unchanged.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate and Restore PDF Page Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, save the rotated file, then revert the page to its original orientation and save the restored document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Based on Theme
examples.description: Shows how to read a theme from a configuration file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a CMYK background color to all pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying an RGB brand color as the background for each page, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
examples.description: Demonstrates converting HSL color values to RGB and applying the resulting color as a page background in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to apply a transparent background to an entire PDF document and each of its pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Trim Blank Pages from PDF with Tolerance
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, detecting blank pages using a pixel‑fill tolerance, removing those pages, and saving the trimmed document.

examples.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages Using Content Bounding Box
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by calculating the content bounding box and setting the TrimBox, with a fallback for completely blank pages.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages with vector graphics, and export each page's graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
examples.description: Shows how to load several PDF files, export each form's fields to JSON using Aspose.Pdf, and merge the results into one JSON array for batch processing.

examples.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Single SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, removes the outer <svg> tags, wraps each fragment in a <g> element, and writes a combined multi‑page SVG file.

examples.title: Combine Multiple PDFs into a Single Multi‑Page SVG
examples.description: Loads several PDF files, extracts each page as SVG fragments with Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges the fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Markdown While Preserving Paragraph Indentation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, processing its paragraphs to retain indentation, and saving the content as a formatted Markdown file.

examples.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields via Document.Form.Count.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, selects a specific page, and iterates through all form fields on that page, logging each field's name, type, and value.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF containing AcroForm fields and exports those fields to an XFDF file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, filters graphic elements by bounding rectangle area, and exports each qualifying graphic to a separate SVG file.

examples.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF using a FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method and a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract all form field values from a PDF and write them to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade with a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to a JSON string using Form.ExportToJson, and display the result.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to UTF-8 JSON File
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all form fields, and write them to a UTF‑8 encoded JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and export its form fields to a JSON file via a command‑line utility.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form, and export all form fields directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML using MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF directly into a MemoryStream as XML using Aspose.Pdf's Form.ExportXml method.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with form fields using Aspose.Pdf and export the document model, including the form data, to an XML file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields with Specific Prefix to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, filters form fields whose names start with a given prefix, and writes the field names and values to an indented JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's Form facade to export PDF form fields to an FDF file and ensure the stream and form are closed.

examples.title: Export PDF Page as Raster PNG with Specified DPI
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rasterize a PDF page, including all vector graphics, into a PNG image at a given DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
examples.description: Shows how to extract each graphic subpath from PDF pages and save them as individual SVG files with transparent backgrounds using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Border Markers
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, adding visual border markers to each cell, and exporting the result to a CSV file.

examples.title: Export PDF to HTML, PNG, and XFDF with Stream Disposal
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and exports the entire document to HTML, the first page to a PNG image, and all annotations to an XFDF file, each operation using a FileStream that is closed after use.

examples.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Options and CSS Styling
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting a PDF to SVG using SvgSaveOptions (DPI scaling and multithreading) and extracting page vector graphics with SvgExtractionOptions, then injecting custom CSS into the resulting SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and outputs the results as a JSON boolean array.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each embedded image as a PNG file in an output folder.

examples.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting the text from its first page using TextAbsorber, and saving the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a specified output directory.

examples.title: Extract Specific Graphic Element from PDF and Save as SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to absorb graphic elements from a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, select one by its index, and export the chosen element as an SVG file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images with GraphicsAbsorber and Save as JPEG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect only image elements from each PDF page, locate their placement, render the page, crop the images, and export them as JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Page Graphics to SVG Using GraphicsAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to collect graphic elements from selected PDF pages with GraphicsAbsorber and convert them to SVG using SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Paragraphs with Line Breaks from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from a PDF, preserve line breaks, and write the extracted text to a UTF‑8 .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Counts from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and log the number of fonts, tables, and form fields present in each document.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to JSON, and return the JSON as a byte array using a MemoryStream.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Data to JSON Files
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form fields to a corresponding JSON file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to Dictionary
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its string value.

examples.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Convert Pages to SVG
examples.description: Reads a PDF, saves its title and author to a text file, and exports each page as an SVG vector representation.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, iterate through rows and cells, and export each table as a separate CSV file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text Length, Image and Graphic Counts
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the total text length, and count images and XObject graphics (forms) across all pages.

examples.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Values and Labels from PDF Forms
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, identify radio button fields, and retrieve both the selected export value and the visible label of the chosen option.

examples.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Text from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, extracts the visible text of any stamp annotations, and writes the collected strings to a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract Subpaths as PNG Images Using GraphicsAbsorber
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF with vector shapes, uses GraphicsAbsorber to capture each graphic element, converts each element to SVG and then renders it to an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over text fragments, detect superscript or subscript formatting, and wrap the extracted text with Unicode markers.

examples.title: Extract Superscripts and Subscripts from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, analyze font size and baseline positions to identify superscript and subscript fragments, and write the results to a text file.

examples.title: Extract SVG Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color
examples.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from PDF pages as SVG, replace a specific color with a brand color, and save the transformed SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to TXT
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all pages' text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a plain .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, then extract each page as a separate SVG file to preserve vector graphics.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
examples.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, detect vector graphics, and export every graphic as a separate SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page, and use Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor to save each vector graphic on that page as an individual SVG file.

examples.title: Iterate and Fill PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to loop through each form field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read its current value, and set a default value when the field is empty.

examples.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and print each field's name and type.

examples.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its AcroForm, and enumerating the form fields along with their current values.

examples.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, count the widget annotations (form fields) on the page, and log the number for monitoring purposes.

examples.title: Log PDF Form Extraction with Timestamps
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from PDF form XObjects using Aspose.Pdf and record start and finish timestamps in a log file.

examples.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, draws a custom rectangle over it using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then reads the checkbox's value.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, storing results in a thread‑safe collection.

examples.title: Parse and Update Numeric PDF Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to read a numeric form field from a PDF, convert its text value to a decimal, perform a calculation, and write the result back to the field.

examples.title: Preserve PDF Coordinate System When Converting to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates converting each PDF page and the whole document to SVG while keeping the original PDF user space coordinate system using Aspose.Pdf's TrySaveVectorGraphics and SvgSaveOptions with ScaleToPixels disabled.

examples.title: Read AcroForm Fields from a PDF Stream
examples.description: Opens a PDF file as a read‑only stream, creates an Aspose.Pdf Document, and enumerates all AcroForm fields, printing each field's name and value without writing to disk.

examples.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
examples.description: Shows how to read the Value property of a checkbox form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert the string value to a Boolean.

examples.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate every form field, printing each field's full name and concrete type.

examples.title: Retrieve Form Field Types from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form fields, and obtain each field's .NET runtime type via GetType() for classification.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access a specific form field using the Document.Form indexer, and display its basic properties.

examples.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installation
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, checks each referenced font to see if it is installed on the system, and reports any missing fonts.

examples.title: Add Incremental PDF Signature with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 signature, and enable the document for additional signatures using incremental updates with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a visible PKCS#7 digital signature field at the bottom‑right corner of the second page of a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature that records the signing time to a PDF without altering its layout, using incremental update.

examples.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Digital Signature to PDF from Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a file stream, adding a visible signature field, and applying a PKCS#7 detached digital signature using Aspose.PDF.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
examples.description: Shows how to process a folder of encrypted PDFs, obtain passwords from a case‑insensitive dictionary, decrypt each file with Aspose.Pdf, and save the unprotected versions.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt and Digitally Sign PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a visible digital signature using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs Using File Name Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory with Aspose.Pdf, using the file name as both user and owner passwords, and saving the protected files to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from its name and the current date.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted files into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, add a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX certificate, compress the signed document, and save the output.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load PDFs, retrieve a certificate based on document type, and sign all signature fields in each file using Aspose.Pdf. The example processes a collection of PDFs and saves the signed versions.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate Selection
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files, choose a signing certificate based on document metadata, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate and a timestamp authority, saving the signed PDFs to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Images
examples.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a visible signature field using a matching PNG image, applies a visual‑only PKCS#1 signature, and saves the signed PDFs to an output folder.

examples.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF that prevents any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Signature with SHA‑512 Digest
examples.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate with the SHA‑512 digest algorithm using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs each encryption, decryption, and password check, and how to use it to encrypt and decrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Custom Security Handler with Warning Overlay
examples.description: Loads a PDF, adds a semi‑transparent warning text annotation on each page, then encrypts the document using a simple custom security handler that disables copy‑paste via permissions, and saves the secured PDF.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Sign Each Signature Field with Different Certificates
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, decrypts it, enumerates all signature fields, and signs each field using a distinct PKCS#7 certificate before saving the result.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
examples.description: Opens an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypts it, extracts all embedded images to a specified folder, and optionally saves the decrypted PDF for verification.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using a user password, decrypts it, extracts all embedded images to PNG files, and then re‑encrypts the PDF with the same user password and a new owner password.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, removing its encryption, modifying the document's metadata, and saving the updated file.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Encrypted with Certificate Using Hardware Token
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate (with private key) from a hardware token via X509Store and using Aspose.Pdf to open, decrypt, and save a PDF that was encrypted with that certificate.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using the owner password, remove its encryption, and save the decrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, configuring permissions, and saving the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Only Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with user/owner passwords using AES‑256 and set permissions so that only printing is permitted.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Copy Permission and No Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, allow content extraction (copy) and block printing using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, set permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, and save the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password, configure permissions that exclude printing, and save the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF so it can be opened for viewing without a password, while requiring an owner password for any editing, using AES‑256 and restricting permissions to printing only.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, allow high‑resolution printing, and disable content copying with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Restrict Editing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply 128‑bit RC4 encryption, set permissions to allow printing only, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Remove User Password while Keeping Encryption
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening it with the owner password to remove the user password while preserving the encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate and Apply Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, encrypting it using a certificate (AES‑256) and adding a visible digital signature with the same certificate.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste
examples.description: Shows how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler and use Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF while forbidding copy‑paste (extract content) and allowing printing.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with HSM Certificate and Require Smart Card Authentication
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using a public certificate stored on a hardware security module, requiring the corresponding smart‑card private key for decryption, and setting basic permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting a user password for opening and an owner password for permissions, then saving the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 and set permissions to allow printing and content extraction.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user password and defined permissions, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
examples.description: The example creates a PDF, embeds a file as a document‑level attachment, adds a signature field, signs the PDF with a PKCS#7 certificate, and finally encrypts the whole document with user and owner passwords.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve each signature field's certificate, build its X509 chain, and save every certificate in the chain as a DER file.

examples.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Signature
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its signature fields, and logs the digest hash algorithm used for each digital signature.

examples.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, iterate through its pages, and save every image on each page into separate page‑specific folders.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its form fields, filter for signature fields, and print their properties and associated signature details for auditing.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from a PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterates over its form fields, identifies signature fields, and outputs each field's full name together with the page number it appears on.

examples.title: Extract Signature Fields and Add a New Empty Signature Field
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, lists all existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Opens a PDF, locates a signature field, extracts its appearance image, and saves the image as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images from a PDF
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its form fields, extracts the appearance image of each signature field, and saves the images as JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over its signature fields, retrieves the stored signing time, and converts it to UTC.

examples.title: Extract and Verify Signature Certificate Chain in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract the signing certificate from a PDF signature field, build its X509 chain, check each certificate's expiration, and optionally verify the signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: List PDF Signature Dictionaries and Their Object IDs
examples.description: Loads a PDF, scans its AcroForm fields for signature fields, and extracts the indirect object ID of each signature dictionary via reflection.

examples.title: Lock Specific PDF Form Fields After Signing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, marks selected form fields as read‑only to simulate the post‑sign lock, and saves the updated document. The actual digital signature step is omitted due to API restrictions.

examples.title: Lock PDF with Digital Signature (Read‑Only)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital signature and an MDP (Modification Detection and Prevention) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then lock the entire document in read‑only mode.

examples.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically strip a digital signature from a PDF (when allowed) by enabling signature sanitization and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its digital signature fields, and prints each signature's Reason and Location metadata.

examples.title: Create Secured PDF with Watermark Using Custom Security Handler
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image watermark to every page of a PDF and encrypting the document with a custom security handler that implements ICustomSecurityHandler.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply encryption to a signed PDF and configure permissions so that content extraction and form filling are disabled while allowing printing.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed XFA Form Data
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, assigning custom XFA form data, creating a signature field, and signing the document with a PKCS#7 certificate.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and embedding custom XMP metadata in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Finality
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a signature field, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and notes that without a DocMDP certification the signature becomes invalid if the document is altered, effectively preventing further signatures.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate and then flatten all form fields so they can no longer be edited.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, then flatten the signature field to make its visual appearance immutable.

examples.title: Sign PDF from URL and Upload to Azure Blob
examples.description: The example downloads a PDF from a network URL, adds a digital signature using a PFX certificate, and uploads the resulting document to Azure Blob Storage.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token (PKCS#11)
examples.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a signing certificate from a hardware token via the Windows certificate store, creates an external signature, adds a signature field, signs the document, and saves the signed PDF.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#12 certificate, and make the field read‑only to prevent further modifications.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations Except Signature
examples.description: Shows how to add a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then delete every other annotation while keeping the signature intact.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Using External Signature (No PIN Prompt)
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate from a smart‑card store and signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using an external signature delegate that avoids a PIN prompt.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Certification Allowing Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate, enabling a certification level that permits adding annotations after signing.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#7 and embed custom XML data
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, create a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, embed custom XML data via a delegate, and save the signed document.

examples.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it with an ECC P‑256 certificate (PFX) using Aspose.Pdf's PKCS7 support.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact, and Location
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location properties.

examples.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a signature field, and digitally sign it using a 4096‑bit RSA certificate (PFX) with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑384 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and explicitly set the SHA‑384 digest algorithm with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, let the user pick a smart‑card certificate, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF and obtain a trusted timestamp from a TSA server using Aspose.Pdf's PKCS#7 support.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a custom PNG image as the visible appearance with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, sign it with a PKCS#1 certificate using Aspose.Pdf, and save the signed document. The example also notes the limitation of certification levels for allowing page appends.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visual Signature Image
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a memory stream, adds a signature field on the first page, applies an image as the visual appearance, and signs the document using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Sign PDF Using Windows Store Certificate
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, retrieve a certificate by thumbprint from the CurrentUser store, and apply an external PKCS#7 signature with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using CRL Revocation Checking
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify a digital signature in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with CRL distribution points to check revocation status.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature and Extract Certificate Details
examples.description: Opens a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature, extracts the embedded X.509 certificate for analysis, and checks the document for compromised signatures.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate signature fields, and verify each digital signature against a trusted root CA using Aspose.Pdf's validation options.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature Using OCSP Revocation Check
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure ValidationOptions to use OCSP, and verify each signature field, reporting the verification result.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and List SAN Entries
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, validates each digital signature with Aspose.Pdf, extracts the signing certificate, and outputs its Subject Alternative Name (SAN) entries.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
examples.description: The example loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature using strict validation, extracts the signing certificate, and checks that the signature timestamp falls inside the certificate's validity period.

examples.title: Validate Detached PKCS#7 Signature and Certificate Chain in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate signature fields, and verify a detached PKCS#7 digital signature while checking the certificate chain using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Auto-Adjusting Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on each PDF page that automatically scales its font size to fit a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Image Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp behind the existing content of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom-Sized Page Stamp to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PdfPageStamp with custom width, height, and position, then applying it to a chosen page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place a rotated image stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent, 45° rotated text stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Faint Text Overlay to PDF Pages

examples.title: Import Form Field Appearance from JSON into PDF
