examples.title: Import Form Data from GZIP‑Compressed JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP JSON payload on the fly, import the form field values using Form.ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Form Data from JSON via REST API
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, retrieve JSON form data from a REST API, import the data into the PDF form using ImportFromJson, and save the populated PDF.

examples.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bulk import form field values from a JSON file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method and then save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Form Fields from CSV into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading field definitions from a CSV file, creating corresponding form fields, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Import XML Interaction Log and XFDF Annotations to Reconstruct PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML interaction log into a PDF document, optionally importing XFDF annotations, and saving the reconstructed PDF for viewer testing.

examples.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import form field values from a JSON string, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into PDF Hidden Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and populate a hidden form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading XML XFA data and assigning it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then saving the filled PDF.

examples.title: Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read XFDF (XML) form data, import the field values into the PDF form, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, assign XFA data from an XML file to repopulate its form fields, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import XFA form data from an XML string directly into a PDF document and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XML Form Data from Network Stream into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to download XML form data over HTTP, load it into an XmlDocument, and import it into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XML Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
examples.description: Demonstrates loading digital signature details from an XML file, locating a signature field in a PDF, and applying a PKCS#7 signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XML Subset and Update PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, read an XML file containing a subset of field values, update matching PDF form fields, and save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Incrementally Update PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates copying a PDF, modifying a form field, and saving the document with incremental updates to retain previous revisions.

examples.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a new TextBox form field to a PDF and place it at a specific index in the Document.Form collection to control its layout order.

examples.title: Create Multi-Select List Box with Three Pre-Selected Items
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-select list box to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, populate it with options, and pre-select three items to illustrate a three-item selection limit.

examples.title: List All PDF Form Field Names
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm and XFA form, and enumerate all field names present in the document.

examples.title: Add Locale-Aware Label with JavaScript to PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF containing a text box form field and embeds JavaScript that selects a label based on the viewer's language using a dictionary of translations.

examples.title: Lock PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only) with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to set each form field in a PDF to read‑only using Aspose.Pdf and then save the locked document.

examples.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications and Add New TextBox
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over its form fields, modify each field's value, add a new TextBox field, and record every change to a log file for audit and troubleshooting.

examples.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
examples.description: Shows how to set the Required property of a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf, creating the field if it does not already exist.

examples.title: Merge PDFs while Renaming AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to merge two PDF documents that contain AcroForm fields, renaming the fields in the source document to keep names unique and avoid conflicts.

examples.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Distinct AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with multiple pages and add different AcroForm fields (textbox, checkbox, combobox) to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Parallel Fill Multiple PDF Forms
examples.description: Shows how to use Parallel.ForEach to load, populate, and save several PDF documents at the same time by setting form field values with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Dependent Labels
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form containing a language selection combo box and use JavaScript to change a label field's text dynamically based on the selected language.

examples.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Specific Dynamic Label
examples.description: The example creates a PDF document containing a combo box for language selection and a text box whose label updates dynamically via JavaScript based on the chosen locale.

examples.title: Populate ComboBox Field from DataTable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill an Aspose.Pdf combo box form field with options retrieved from a database (simulated by a DataTable) and save the PDF.

examples.title: Post PDF Form Data as XML to a Remote Endpoint
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its form fields, builds an XML document with the field names and values, and posts the XML to a specified HTTP endpoint.

examples.title: Save Modified PDF to a New File While Preserving Original
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a text annotation, and saving the modified document to a new file so the original remains unchanged.

examples.title: Read PDF Form Field Value
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, locates a form field by its name, and writes the field's value or state to the console, handling common field types.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through all form fields in a PDF and clear any attached JavaScript actions, securing the document before distribution.

examples.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove a Specific Form Field from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate a form field by its name and delete it from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form.Delete method.

examples.title: Remove Typewriter Form XObjects from a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Typewriter form XObjects (Subtype "Form") on page three of a PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber.

examples.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field, rename its Name, PartialName, and MappingName properties, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Form Placeholder with Current Date
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and set its contents to the current system date using Aspose.Pdf's PageDate formatting.

examples.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using an XML Template
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect an XFA form in a PDF, import field definitions from an XML template, create corresponding AcroForm fields, and save the document as a standard AcroForm PDF.

examples.title: Create Required Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a required digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the document to prevent further changes.

examples.title: Restore Editable Form Fields from a Flattened PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect a flattened PDF and restore the original editable form fields by reloading the backup document.

examples.title: Right-align Number Form Field in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve a NumberField form field, and set its text alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Form Field Label by 45 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF form field's label to a 45‑degree angle using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Select List Box Option by Index in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates ListBox form fields, sets the selected entry using a 1‑based index, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Select Radio Button Option in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates the first radio button field, selects a specified option, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set Barcode Field to Code128 and Link to Source Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create or retrieve a barcode form field, set its format to Code128, and keep it synchronized with a text field using JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf document.

examples.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a checkbox form field in a PDF and set its default value to checked programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Checkbox Field Value in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates a checkbox form field by name, sets it to checked or unchecked based on input, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for Comments Field in PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, locate a TextBox field named 'Comments', and restrict its input to 100 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Dashed Border on PDF Form TextBox Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBox form field, and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Default Appearance for a PDF Text Box Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field and set its default appearance (font, size, and color) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Default Selected Country in PDF Combo Box
examples.description: Shows how to set the default selected item of the 'Country' combo box in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Forms API.

examples.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the default selected option of a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf. The example loads a PDF, updates the 'PaymentMethod' radio group to 'Credit', and saves the result.

examples.title: Set Default Value for PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box form field to a PDF and define its default value that appears when the document is opened.

examples.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'EmployeeID' form field, mark it as read‑only to prevent user edits, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set Export Value for PDF Radio Button Option
examples.description: Shows how to add or update a radio button option in a PDF form and assign a custom export value using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set File Size Limit for PDF Attachment Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to restrict the maximum file size for attachment fields to 2 MB by configuring Aspose.Pdf's global file‑size limit before loading and saving a PDF document.

examples.title: Set Font Size and Style for PDF Text Field
examples.description: Shows how to modify the font size, color, and style of a PDF form text field using Aspose.Pdf by setting global font limits and applying a DefaultAppearance.

examples.title: Set Form Field Border Color and Width
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form field's border color and thickness using Aspose.Pdf to match corporate styling guidelines.

examples.title: Set Form Field Border Style to Beveled
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form field's border to a beveled style using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Text Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to limit a PDF form text box to a specific number of characters using Aspose.Pdf's TextBoxField.MaxLen property.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Field
examples.description: Shows how to add a text box form field to a PDF and enforce a maximum input length of 20 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Text Box Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a text box form field, set its MaxLen property to restrict user input, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set NoExport Flag on Sensitive PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to mark specific PDF form fields as non‑exportable (NoExport) using Aspose.Pdf, preventing sensitive data like SSN or credit card numbers from being included in exported data.

examples.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, mark it as read‑only, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Form Field Value Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds a form field by name, updates its value (including text boxes, checkboxes, and radio buttons), and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Form Open Zoom Level
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to FormEditor and configure the document's OpenAction with a GoToAction and XYZExplicitDestination to define the initial zoom when the form is opened.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata After Form Processing
examples.description: Loads a PDF, optionally updates a form field, then sets standard document metadata such as author, title, subject, and keywords before saving the file.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata with Fallback Defaults
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, check for missing metadata fields, and assign default values before saving the document.

examples.title: Set Password Value for PDF Form Field
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds a password box form field, assigns a new password, optionally makes the field read‑only, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Set Red Border Color for PDF Text Fields
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF form fields and change a text box's border (via the field's Color property) to red, highlighting mandatory information using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Text Field Background Color to Light Gray
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, and change its background (fill) color to light gray using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'Email' form field, assign a tooltip via the AlternateName property, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF signature field and then set the field to read‑only so it cannot be altered during review.

examples.title: Synchronize Form Data Across Multiple PDFs Using XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading several PDF documents, binding the same XML form data to each, and saving the synchronized PDFs in parallel.

examples.title: Synchronize Form Data Between PDFs Using XFDF
examples.description: Exports form field values from a source PDF to an XFDF file and imports them into a target PDF, creating a filled copy of the target document.

examples.title: Test SubmitFormAction Returns 200 OK
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a submit button using Aspose.Pdf and verify via a unit test that the configured submit URL responds with HTTP 200 using a simulated POST request.

examples.title: Toggle PDF Form Field Visibility with JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a checkbox field to hide or show another form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Transform PDF Form Data Between JSON Schemas
examples.description: The example extracts form fields from a source PDF to JSON, renames the fields, and imports the transformed data into another PDF, creating sample PDFs if they are missing.

examples.title: Transform XML with XSLT and Fill PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file, apply an XSLT transformation, and use the transformed data to populate fields in an Aspose.Pdf form.

examples.title: Update PDF Form Fields Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to modify text, checkbox, and radio‑button fields in a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf without using the high‑level Facade API.

examples.title: Validate Date Field to Disallow Dates Before 2000
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a DateField to a PDF and attaching JavaScript that prevents users from entering dates earlier than January 1, 2000.

examples.title: Validate Email Field Before Saving PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, checks that the "email" text box contains an '@' character, and saves the document only if the validation succeeds.

examples.title: Validate MaxLen Truncation in PDF TextBox Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how setting MaxLen on a TextBoxField limits input to 50 characters, causing excess characters to be truncated when the PDF is saved and reloaded.

examples.title: Validate Numeric TextBoxField Input in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a TextBoxField intended for numeric input and demonstrates programmatic validation that rejects alphabetic characters by throwing an exception.

examples.title: Validate PDF File Size Before Form Submission
examples.description: Shows how to restrict an uploaded PDF to a maximum of 5 MB using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and handle size‑limit exceptions to block form submission.

examples.title: Validate Password Protection on Encrypted PDF Form Field
examples.description: Creates an encrypted PDF containing a text box form field, then verifies that opening the file with an incorrect password throws an InvalidPasswordException while the correct password grants access to the field value.

examples.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Exporting to JSON
examples.description: The example loads a PDF form, checks that all fields marked as required have values, and exports the form data to a JSON file only when validation passes.

examples.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Saving
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF's form fields using Aspose.Pdf, check that all fields marked as required are filled, and save the document only when validation succeeds.

examples.title: Validate XML against XSD and Populate PDF XFA Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and, when valid, import the data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count Before Processing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, check the number of form fields using Document.Form.Count, and only process the document when the expected field count is present.

examples.title: Add Background Image to PDF and Overlay Graph Shapes
examples.description: Shows how to insert a background image on a PDF page and draw vector shapes (rectangle and line) on top using Aspose.Pdf Graph with Z‑index control.

examples.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph object, aligns it to the page center horizontally, adds it to the first page's Paragraphs collection, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates drawing a rectangle with a 2‑point border and dashed line style inside a Graph container and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Ellipse Graph to PDF Pages Using Parallel.ForEach
examples.description: Demonstrates loading PDF files, iterating through each page, creating a Graph with an ellipse shape, and saving the modified document while processing multiple PDFs concurrently with Parallel.ForEach.

examples.title: Add Ellipse with Bounds Checking to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding an ellipse inside a Graph, enabling bounds checking that throws if the shape exceeds page limits, and logging detailed coordinates when an exception occurs, with platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

examples.title: Add Filled Arc with Radial Gradient to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create an Arc shape inside a Graph and fill it with a radial gradient shading in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add a Filled Circle to a PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph container, and draw a filled circle with a given radius and center coordinates.

examples.title: Add Filled Curve to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph container, draw a Bezier curve with a fill color and border thickness, and save the file.

examples.title: Add Filled Rectangle with Dashed Border to PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a Graph container, drawing a filled rectangle with a custom dash pattern and border width, and saving the document.

examples.title: Add Gradient-Filled Ellipse to PDF Graph
examples.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, draws an ellipse, and fills it with an axial gradient that transitions from red to blue.

examples.title: Add Gradient Rectangle with Alpha Transparency to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangle filled with a linear axial gradient that transitions from fully transparent to fully opaque, illustrating the use of the alpha channel in Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Graph with Shapes to a New PDF Page
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds a blank page, creates a Graph object, draws rectangle, ellipse and line shapes, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Graph to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line, adds it to the first page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Graph with Labels to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, creating a Graph with rectangle, line, and ellipse shapes, adding text labels using TextBuilder, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Add Multi-Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF graph and add multiple line segments, each with its own color, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Multiple Rectangles to a PDF Graph with Overlap Checking
examples.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a graph area, and places several rectangles of varying sizes while verifying their page bounds to ensure no overlap occurs.

examples.title: Add Radial Gradient Rectangle to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a rectangle inside a graph and fill it with a radial gradient that transitions from opaque red at the center to transparent red at the edges, then save the PDF.

examples.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a semi‑transparent offset rectangle as a shadow, and place a main rectangle on top.

examples.title: Add a Red Filled Rectangle to a PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph that covers the page, and draw a solid red rectangle with an optional black border using absolute coordinates.

examples.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a regular hexagon shape inside a PDF graph, set its border color and thickness, and save the document.

examples.title: Add Shadow Effect to a Filled Rectangle in a PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to simulate a shadow for a rectangle inside an Aspose.Pdf Graph by drawing an offset semi‑transparent rectangle behind the main shape.

examples.title: Add Shapes with Bounds Checking to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding rectangles, ellipses and lines inside a Graph container, performing custom bounds‑checking, catching a custom exception, logging out‑of‑range coordinates, and saving the document.

examples.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Custom Font and Position
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a graph in a PDF, applying styling, and inserting a text fragment with a specific font, size, color, and coordinates inside the graph.

examples.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Stroke to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a Graph container, drawing an unfilled arc, and configuring its line width and dash pattern.

examples.title: Adjust Shape Position to Fit Within PDF Page Bounds
examples.description: Shows how to verify a rectangle's coordinates against a PDF page size and reposition it so the shape stays inside the page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a clipping rectangle with low‑level PDF operators and render a graph so that its shapes appear only inside the defined area.

examples.title: Apply Dictionary-Based Fill Colors to PDF Shapes
examples.description: Demonstrates using a Dictionary to map shape identifiers to Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Color values and applying those colors when creating rectangles, ellipses, and lines within a PDF graph.

examples.title: Apply JSON-Defined Fill Colors to PDF Shapes
examples.description: The example loads a JSON configuration that maps shape types to color names, resolves the colors, and uses Aspose.Pdf to draw rectangles, ellipses and lines with the specified fill or stroke colors in a PDF.

examples.title: Apply Radial Gradient Fill to an Ellipse with Dark Gray Border
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph canvas, draw an ellipse, set a dark gray border, and fill the shape with a radial gradient using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Texture Brush to Ellipse in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an image as a texture, adding it to a PDF page, and drawing an ellipse with a transparent fill so the image shows through as a pattern.

examples.title: Batch Insert Graph with Logo into PDFs
examples.description: Loads each PDF in a folder, creates a vector graph containing a background rectangle, a company‑logo rectangle, and a sample line, adds the graph to the first page, and saves the modified file to an output folder.

examples.title: Calculate Bounding Box of an Ellipse in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, compute its bounding box using CalculateContentBBox, and print the coordinates.

examples.title: Clone Rectangle and Change Fill Color in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF document, draws a rectangle, clones it with a different fill color, adds both rectangles to a graph, and saves the file.

examples.title: Configure Graph Line Style and Add Custom Bordered Rectangle
examples.description: Shows how to set line width and dash pattern on a Graph, apply the same style to a rectangle shape, and add the shape to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a Bezier Curve in a PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to add a Bezier curve defined by four control points to a PDF graph and customize its stroke color and line width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a Dimension‑Specific Line in a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's drawing library to add a line with explicit coordinates to a Graph object and embed it in a PDF page.

examples.title: Create a Dimension‑Specific Rectangle Inside a PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Rectangle classes to draw a rectangle with explicit dimensions and styling inside a PDF page.

examples.title: Create Ellipse with Custom Radii and Stroke Color in PDF
examples.description: This example demonstrates how to draw an ellipse inside a Graph container in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying horizontal and vertical radii and setting the stroke color.

examples.title: Create a Graph Matching Page Size in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to instantiate a Graph that exactly matches a PDF page's width and height and add a rectangle shape to it using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Graph with Rectangle and Ellipse in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to build a Graph, add rectangle and ellipse shapes with fill and stroke properties, and place the graph on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Layered Graph in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a Graph, add shapes, create a PDF layer with low‑level drawing operators, control its visibility, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a PDF Collage by Positioning Multiple Graphs
examples.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects—a rectangle, an ellipse, and a line—at different page coordinates to build a collage on a single PDF page.

examples.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with multiple shapes whose border colors are set using a dictionary lookup table.

examples.title: Create PDF Graph with Filled Rectangle and Stroke-Only Circle
examples.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a graph containing a filled rectangle and a stroke‑only circle, and saves the file.

examples.title: Create PDF with Filled Arc Graph
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a filled arc with a custom light‑blue color, and save the document.

examples.title: Create PDF with In-Memory Graph using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF entirely in memory, add a simple graph containing a rectangle shape, and return the PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Create PDF with Proportional Graphs on Each Page
examples.description: Generates a PDF where each page contains a graph sized and positioned proportionally to the page dimensions, and adds rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes to the graph.

examples.title: Create a PDF with a Single Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add a default‑size page, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Predefined Graph with Shapes for PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line that can be added to any PDF page.

examples.title: Create and Rotate an Ellipse in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an ellipse to a PDF, applying a 45° rotation via GraphInfo, setting visual styles, and saving the document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Rounded Rectangle with Solid Fill in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle with rounded corners, set a corner radius, and apply a solid fill and border using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a star polygon with a configurable number of points, fill color, and outline, and render it inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Path objects.

examples.title: Draw Ellipse with Transparent Fill and Centered Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create an ellipse with a thick border and semi‑transparent fill using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then place a centered TextFragment inside the shape.

examples.title: Draw a Line with Cap Style in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a straight line, set its color and thickness, and apply a line cap style.

examples.title: Create Ellipse with Radial Gradient Pattern Fill
examples.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse in a PDF and fill it with a custom radial gradient pattern brush using Aspose.Pdf, then adds a text label to verify rendering.

examples.title: Enable BoundsCheckMode for Graph Shape Validation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph container, add a rectangle shape, and enable BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit to ensure the shape fits within the graph bounds before rendering the PDF.

examples.title: Export a Graph to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph object to a page, and save the result as a PDF file.

examples.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it to a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream to a file on disk.

examples.title: Graph Drawing with Shapes and Clipping Discussion
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding rectangle and ellipse shapes, and explains that Aspose.Pdf.Graph lacks a Clip property, suggesting the use of Page.AddGraphics with a clipping rectangle.

examples.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart with Rectangles
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a simple horizontal bar chart in a PDF by looping to add ten rectangle shapes using Aspose.Pdf. Each rectangle is placed with incremental X coordinates and custom styling.

examples.title: Insert Centered Text into a Graph Rectangle in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle inside a Graph and place a centered "Hello World" TextFragment at its center using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Circle with Radial Gradient Fill into PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a circle shape to an Aspose.Pdf Graph and fill it with a radial gradient using two colors.

examples.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and style its border with a dashed line using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Full-Page Watermark Rectangle into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: The example iterates over all PDF files in a folder, adds a light-gray rectangle that covers each page as a watermark, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

examples.title: Insert Graph into PDF Footer Using Page Margins
examples.description: Shows how to create a simple graph shape and place it in the footer area of a PDF page by configuring footer margins with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Rounded Rectangle into PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle with rounded corners, applying a solid fill color and border, and saving the PDF.

examples.title: Insert, Scale, and Rotate an External Image in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an external image to a PDF page (or graph), scale it proportionally, and rotate it by a specified angle using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Log Shape Bounding Boxes in PDF Graph
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a graph containing rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes, then iterates over the shapes to output each shape's bounding box coordinates (or notes when unavailable).

examples.title: Create Multi-Page PDF with Full-Page Graphs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with multiple pages where each page contains a Graph that fills the entire page dimensions using Aspose.PDF.

examples.title: Non‑Uniform Scaling of a Graph in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a graph, add a shape, and apply different scaling factors on the X and Y axes to change its aspect ratio before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Create PDF with Overlapping Shapes in Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add a Graph container, and place two overlapping rectangle shapes inside it using Aspose.Pdf. It also notes the removal of BoundsCheckMode in recent versions.

examples.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph container to a PDF page, draw rectangle and ellipse shapes, and place TextFragment objects with different fonts and colors inside each shape using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Report with Graph and Legend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF report containing a simple bar‑graph made of colored rectangles and a corresponding legend using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Place a Graph Aligned to Left Margin with Offset in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a Graph object, align it to the left margin with a custom offset, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate a Graph Element in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a graph containing a rectangle shape, apply a 45‑degree rotation to the entire graph, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes in an Aspose.Pdf Graph before adding it to a PDF page.

examples.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting an ARGB color and adding the shape to a Graph container.

examples.title: Serialize PDF to Byte Array for Transmission
examples.description: Loads a PDF file containing a graph, saves it into a MemoryStream, and extracts a byte array that can be transmitted over a network.

examples.title: Set Graph Width and Height in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in a PDF, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a rectangle shape, and saving the document.

examples.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity to 50% in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a rectangle shape with a semi‑transparent fill using an ARGB color value, and save the document for visual verification.

examples.title: Skew a Rectangle in a PDF Graph on the X‑Axis
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a rectangle, and apply an X‑axis skew to achieve a slanted visual effect.

examples.title: Test Out‑of‑Bounds Rectangle Throws BoundsOutOfRangeException
examples.description: Demonstrates a unit test that adds a rectangle larger than the page size and asserts that Aspose.Pdf.Generator throws a BoundsOutOfRangeException.

examples.title: Toggle Graph BoundsCheckMode Based on User Setting
examples.description: Demonstrates how to switch the Aspose.Pdf Graph's BoundsCheckMode between strict exception throwing and default ignore behavior according to a user‑defined setting, and adds the graph to a PDF page.

examples.title: Translate Graph Element in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to reposition a shape inside an Aspose.Pdf Graph by applying horizontal and vertical offsets and updating the PDF document.

examples.title: Create Transparent Shape Using Graph Layer in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to start a transparency layer with a Graph, draw a semi‑transparent rectangle, and save the PDF document.

examples.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages with Opacity
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, place a semi‑transparent background image on every page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to embed a background image on every page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and adjust its opacity for a subtle shading effect.

examples.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Pattern Image with Low Opacity to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Texture Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place a texture image as the background of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BackgroundImage property.

examples.title: Add Centered Company Logo to First PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, placing a logo image at the center of the first page using an ImageStamp, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Add Decorative Footer Image to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through all pages, and add a footer image that scales proportionally to the page width before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Decorative Header Image to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a header image at the top of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, positioning it so it doesn't overlap existing content.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image watermark rotated 45° on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add DICOM Image to PDF Using FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM medical image from a FileStream and inserting it into a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Extracted Vector Graphics to a New PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting vector graphics from an existing PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and adding them to a newly created page via a Graph container.

examples.title: Add Image with Alternative Text to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates inserting an image onto a PDF page and assigning alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add PNG Logo to First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, ensure source files exist, and insert a PNG logo onto the first page at specific coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Raster Image to a New PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates inserting a raster image onto a newly added PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the Paragraphs collection.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a PNG watermark image on each page of a PDF with configurable opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Overlay Image to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent PNG overlay to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, scaling the image to cover the full page.

examples.title: Add Theme‑Based Overlay to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON theme configuration, parsing default and per‑page colors, and applying a semi‑transparent background overlay to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Transparent PNG Overlay to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a transparent PNG image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring the image appears above existing content.

examples.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, extract each embedded image from every page, and save them to organized output directories using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files, detect pages with vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as separate SVG files in dedicated folders.

examples.title: Collect Image Resolution Metadata from PDF Pages
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through each page, extracts all images using ImagePlacementAbsorber, and records their X/Y DPI resolution for reporting.

examples.title: Compress Large Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's optimization features to compress images (e.g., those over 1 MB) by adjusting quality and resolution, then save a smaller PDF.

examples.title: Compress Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to compress images within a PDF by applying JPEG compression and optional resolution limits, then saving the optimized document.

examples.title: Convert Even PDF Pages to Grayscale
examples.description: Loads a PDF, converts each even‑numbered page to grayscale using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with Default Font
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert an entire PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf, specifying resolution, TIFF settings, and a default font for missing glyphs.

examples.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG Using Arial as Default Font
examples.description: The example loads a PDF document and converts each page to a PNG image, configuring the rendering options to use Arial as the default font for missing glyphs.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Default Font
examples.description: Loads a PDF, sets RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName to "Times New Roman", and converts each page to a 300 DPI PNG image.

examples.title: Copy Vector Graphics Between PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract vector graphic elements from a source PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and insert them into a destination PDF page.

examples.title: Correct EXIF Orientation of Images in PDF
examples.description: Iterates through all images in a PDF, detects EXIF orientation metadata, rotates or flips the image accordingly, and replaces the original image with the corrected version.

examples.title: Delete Specific Raster Image from PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to remove a raster image from a PDF page by deleting it from the page's image resources, which also clears its references in the page content.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to BMP Images at 300 DPI
examples.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document into a high‑resolution BMP image (300 DPI) using Aspose.Pdf rendering options.

examples.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF to PNG
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves every raster image as an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate raster XImage objects, and save each image to disk while keeping its original format.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect vector graphic elements from a specific PDF page and convert them into an SVG file for further manipulation.

examples.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
examples.description: Creates 150x200 pixel PNG thumbnail images for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

examples.title: Insert DICOM Image with Custom Size into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM image, setting its width and height, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Raster Image into PDF at Absolute Coordinates
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, define a rectangle with absolute coordinates, and insert a raster image onto a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Extracted Vector Graphic to New Position
examples.description: Shows how to extract a vector graphic from a PDF page with GraphicsAbsorber, translate it by updating its Position (and matrix), and save the modified document.

examples.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete every image on each page of a PDF by clearing the page's image collection with Aspose.Pdf and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Remove Duplicate Images from PDF
examples.description: Iterates through all pages of a PDF, computes a hash for each image's raw bytes, and removes images that have already been encountered, effectively eliminating duplicate images.

examples.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, use ImagePlacementAbsorber to find images, and delete those with a horizontal or vertical DPI lower than 72 before optimizing and saving the document.

examples.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to scan each page of a PDF, detect images with a DPI lower than 72 using ImagePlacementAbsorber, and delete those images. The document is then optimized and saved.

examples.title: Remove Specific Vector Graphic from PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to locate and delete a vector graphic on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber.

examples.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with Fallback Font
examples.description: Demonstrates how to render the first page of a PDF document to a PNG image while specifying a fallback font using Aspose.Pdf's rendering options.

examples.title: Render PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font Substitution
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to a high‑resolution JPEG image while specifying a default font for any missing glyphs.

examples.title: Render PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression and Font Fallback
examples.description: Loads a PDF, applies a default fallback font for missing characters, and converts all pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression.

examples.title: Render PDF to PNG at 300 DPI
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, optionally sets a default font, and renders each page to a 300‑DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace an Image on a PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a PDF page with a new image loaded from a file stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with QR Placeholder
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over odd‑numbered pages, finds each image placement and replaces the image with a generated PNG that serves as a QR‑code placeholder containing page and position information.

examples.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with Placeholder
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over odd‑numbered pages of a PDF and replace each existing image with a placeholder graphic while preserving the original image dimensions.

examples.title: Replace Images on a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace selected images on a given PDF page by mapping image indices to new image file paths.

examples.title: Replace Images on Last PDF Page with Full-Width Banner
examples.description: Shows how to hide all existing images on the last page of a PDF and add a single banner image that spans the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Images on PDF Pages with a New Logo
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate all image placements on each page of a PDF using ImagePlacementAbsorber and replace them with a specified logo image.

examples.title: Replace Images with Monochrome Versions in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, detect images with a specific palette, convert them to grayscale, and replace the originals using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Images with Placeholder and Hyperlink
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace each image in a PDF with a gray placeholder rectangle and add a hyperlink annotation that points to the original image location.

examples.title: Replace Index Page Images with a Banner Image
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the first page's image resources, and replace every existing image with a single banner JPEG for branding updates.

examples.title: Replace JPEG with High-Resolution PNG on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image on the third page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution PNG using the Resources.Images collection.

examples.title: Replace JPEG Images with PNG in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate all JPEG images in a PDF document and replace them with a PNG image while preserving the original position, size, and transformations using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Images with ICC‑Profile Versions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF and replace its images with JPEGs that contain embedded ICC profiles using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace All PDF Images with a Placeholder
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and replace every embedded image with a single placeholder image to protect confidential content.

examples.title: Replace PDF Images with QR Code Placeholder
examples.description: Shows how to walk through each page of a PDF, replace every embedded image with a QR‑code placeholder image, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Replace Raster Images with Vector Graphics in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract existing vector graphics, remove raster images from each page, and save an optimized PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Title Page Images with High-Resolution Banner
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses the first (title) page, and replaces all existing images on that page with a high‑resolution banner while preserving the existing text layout.

examples.title: Replace Vector Graphic with Raster Image in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect vector graphics on PDF pages, optionally extract them as SVG, and overlay a raster image at the same location using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Embedded Raster Image in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to change the width and height of raster images embedded in a PDF by setting the FixWidth and FixHeight properties and then saving the document.

examples.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages to Half Size
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, extract embedded images, resize them to 50% of their original width and height, and replace the images back into the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Images in PDF Using Configurable Scale Factor
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a scaling factor from appsettings.json and applying it to all images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Images in PDF Using a Scaling Factor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a scaling factor from a configuration file and apply it to all images in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The modified PDF is then saved to a new file.

examples.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages Using JSON Configuration
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that defines target dimensions per page, extract each image on those pages, resize it with System.Drawing, and replace it in the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Retrieve and Log Alternative Text of PDF Images
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its images, extracts any alternative (alt) text associated with the images, and writes the results to the console for auditing.

examples.title: Set Alternative Text for Images in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign alternative text to each image in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf to enhance accessibility for screen readers.

examples.title: Transfer Vector Graphic Between PDF Pages with Position Offset
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting vector graphics from one PDF page, applying a translation offset (via a matrix or position adjustment), and placing the graphic onto another page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Numbered Column to PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and insert sequential numbers into the first column of each row.

examples.title: Add a Bullet List Inside a Table Cell
examples.description: Shows how to create a bullet list within a PDF table cell by adding separate TextFragment paragraphs prefixed with a bullet character.

examples.title: Add Checkbox Form Field Inside Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table, adding text to a cell, and inserting a CheckboxField form element inside that cell using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Footer Row to Tagged PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to create a table with header, body, and a footer that appears at the bottom of each page when the table spans multiple pages in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Footnote References in Table Cells
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert superscript footnote references inside table cells and associate them with footnote paragraphs at the end of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a web hyperlink into a table cell by creating a LinkAnnotation and adding it to the page.

examples.title: Add Multiline Text to a Table Cell
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF table cell containing multiple lines by adding separate TextFragment objects and a line‑break fragment.

examples.title: Add Radio Button Group Inside a Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a radio button group, defining its options, and placing the group inside a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF and set a semi‑transparent background color using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a table and insert it into a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Add Text with Font and Size to Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextFragment, set its font and size, and insert it into a table cell in a PDF document.

examples.title: Adjust Table Column Widths Proportionally in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to compute total column width, convert each width to a percentage, and assign those percentages to a Table's ColumnWidths so the columns scale proportionally in a PDF document.

examples.title: Apply Alternating Row Background Colors in PDF Table
examples.description: Creates a PDF document with a table and demonstrates how to set alternating background colors for rows by iterating over the table rows and applying a color based on the row index parity.

examples.title: Apply Different AutoFitBehavior Settings to Tables in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set distinct AutoFitBehavior values for separate tables in the same PDF document, resulting in different sizing behavior.

examples.title: Apply Conditional Formatting to PDF Table Cells
examples.description: Demonstrates how to color PDF table cells based on numeric values using Aspose.Pdf, applying red, yellow, or green backgrounds according to defined thresholds.

examples.title: Apply Double Border Style to a PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to add a table to an existing PDF and set a double‑line border using GraphInfo and BorderInfo.

examples.title: Apply Solid Border to Table in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a solid border for an entire table using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Auto‑adjust Row Height in PDF Table
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a table, sets the row's MinRowHeight to 0 to enable automatic height adjustment, inserts short and long text cells, and saves the result.

examples.title: Auto‑Fit Table Columns After Importing Data
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, import a DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, automatically adjust column widths using AutoFit, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: AutoFit Table Columns to Content in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates setting ColumnAdjustment to AutoFitToContent so that table columns automatically resize to fit their cell contents.

examples.title: Batch Add Company Logo Table to PDFs
examples.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, adds a two‑column table containing a company logo and name to the first page of each document, and saves the results with new filenames.

examples.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in several PDF files using TableAbsorber and replace each with a new table built from a DataTable.

examples.title: Calculate Remaining Page Space Before Adding a Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compute the available vertical space on a PDF page by subtracting margins and existing content height, then adds a table within that space.

examples.title: Center Align Table in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to center a Table on a PDF page by setting its HorizontalAlignment property.

examples.title: Check if Table Breaks Across Pages
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a large table, adds it to a page, and checks the Table.IsBroken property to determine if the table will be split across pages.

examples.title: Count Tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect and count tables in a PDF document.

examples.title: Create, Modify, and Retrieve Tables in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF, save it, then extract and modify its content using TableAbsorber.

examples.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, determine the number of rows in a DataTable, import the data into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Create Table with Rows and Columns in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a Table, add rows and cells, and place it into a PDF document.

examples.title: Create PDF Table with Repeating Header Row
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF table and mark its first row as a header that repeats on each new page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Table with Rows and Cells in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a table, add rows and cells, and save the PDF.

examples.title: Custom Row Height in PDF Table
examples.description: Creates a PDF document with a table and demonstrates how to set a fixed height for specific rows using the FixedRowHeight property, while leaving other rows to auto‑size.

examples.title: Delete All Tables from a PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to locate and remove every table structure in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, preserving the remaining content.

examples.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables with TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF and determine if any cells are merged by checking their RowSpan and ColumnSpan values.

examples.title: Disable Table Splitting in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to prevent a table from automatically breaking across pages by setting Table.IsBroken to false.

examples.title: Embed HTML Markup in Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed HTML markup inside a PDF table cell by adding an HtmlFragment to the cell's paragraph collection.

examples.title: Enable Table Splitting Across Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to allow a table to break across multiple pages by setting Table.IsBroken to true before rendering.

examples.title: Export PDF Table to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document containing a table and save its data as a CSV file using Aspose.Pdf's ExcelSaveOptions.

examples.title: Export Table Structure to JSON from Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content to locate a table, iterates through rows and cells extracting actual and alternative text, and writes the structure to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Extract and Iterate Tables from a PDF using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF document and iterate through each table, its rows, cells, and text fragments.

examples.title: Extract and Modify Table Cells Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a table, detect the table using TableAbsorber, read and change a cell's text, and save the result.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to DataTables using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF document and convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, filling rows and columns with the cell text.

examples.title: Extract Text from Table Cells using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber and read the concatenated text of each cell.

examples.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber and retrieve each table's bounding rectangle coordinates (LLX, LLY, URX, URY).

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF and Save as CSV
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert each table to a DataTable, and write the results to CSV files for further processing.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.TableAbsorber to locate tables, iterate through rows and cells, and read the text fragments within each cell.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF to DataTable
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, read cell text into a DataTable, and optionally save the result as CSV.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to locate and read tables in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber while keeping the original layout unchanged.

examples.title: Extract Tables from Rotated PDF Pages Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to check each page's rotation angle and use TableAbsorber to locate and list tables on rotated PDF pages.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF to CSV using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write each table to a separate CSV file, handling cell text concatenation and CSV escaping.

examples.title: Fixed Row Height in PDF Table
examples.description: Creates a PDF document containing a table where each row has a fixed height of 30 points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a Table with Fixed Width in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with a fixed width of 500 points using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

examples.title: Generate PDF Report with Multiple Tables from DataTables
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document where each page contains a titled table imported from a DataTable, using Aspose.Pdf styling and layout features.
